=== Plan 83.11: Centralized I/O driver — architectural pivot (2026-05-27) ===

Architectural response для накопленных 5 М:N race планов (83.10.1, .2, .3, .4, .5).
Каждый из них fix'ил реальный bug в той же зоне — cross-thread visibility
distributed I/O state across N per-worker UV loops. Это не цепочка случайных
багов, это симптомы архитектурного выбора.

DECISION: Path A из 83.10.5 final report — port Tokio 1.x runtime architecture
(centralized driver thread с одним UV loop; workers без UV loops). Tokio
переписали свой runtime ровно по этой причине (1.0 release ~2020). Мы можем
взять их урок без повторения 3 лет patching'а.

Design plan: docs/plans/83.11-centralized-io-driver.md (601 lines, §0-§9).

Key sections:
- §3.0 Tokio reuse map: explicit file-by-file mapping. Anti-pattern: «port
  verbatim где можем, reinvent только с обоснованием». TimerEntry state machine,
  Notify register-then-recheck pattern, task::state CAS, Parker/Unparker idle wake.
- §1.4 honest comparison: Go runtime тоже distributed → платят cost engineering
  team'ом (десятки timer race issues over decade). Nova команда 1 человек —
  невозможно поддерживать distributed runtime качества Go.
- §3.2: 9 phases (~9-15 dev-day):
  - Ф.0/2/7/8: Sonnet
  - Ф.1/3/6/9 design + core migration: Opus + Thinking ON (mandatory)
  - Ф.4/5 secondary primitives migration: Sonnet + Thinking ON
- §8 tests: 20 positive (P1-P20) + 12 negative (N1-N12) + 8 bench (B1-B8)
- §4 acceptance: 0 new М:N race plans within 6 months post-merge

SUPERSEDES Plan 83.10.5 PARTIAL — Tactical Ф.B inadequate, replaced by this
architectural pivot. Plan 83.10.5 branch (plan-83.10.5-iso-cancel-fix) preserved
for diagnostic counters reuse, но НЕ будет merged — Architectural fix делает
её Tactical content obsolete.

Status: 📋 proposed. Next: Ф.1 design phase (Opus + Thinking ON, ~1 day).

=== Plan 83.11 Ф.0-Ф.2 + Ф.3 WIP — implementation session (2026-05-27) ===

Ф.3 WIP (commit 662b4bbdaf1, branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver):
- Time.sleep migrated: _nova_sleep_via_driver submits ARM_SLEEP job →
  driver creates timer на своём UV loop, links в scope.armed_sleeps_head,
  CAS state NEW→ARMED
- Cancel routed: _nova_cancel_via_driver submits CANCEL_SCOPE → driver walks
  armed_list, CAS ARMED→CANCEL_REQ, uv_close
- close_cb stores DRV_CLOSED, nova_sched_wake (cross-thread dispatch_ready)
- runtime.c: legacy cancel_worker_fibers bypassed when driver started
  (would create double-wake race)

ARCHITECTURE VERIFIED through diagnostic:
- All 100 ARM_SLEEP jobs received ✓
- CANCEL_SCOPE processed, armed_list walked ✓
- 100 close_cb fired ✓
- 92/100 fibers have parked=1 at close_cb (wake CAS succeeds)
- 8/100 had parked=0 = wake-before-park race

PARTIAL FIX: futex pattern reduced parked=0 cases к 0, но test STILL 3/30 PASS.
27/30 TIMEOUT. Different race остаётся even with all wakes dispatching correctly.

Heisenbug сигнал: добавление fprintf в close_cb path даёт 1/1 PASS — stdio
lock acts as mfence. Confirms remaining race is memory-ordering related,
likely в worker's wake_pending drain или mco_resume path.

DECISION: stop here, commit honest WIP. Continuation requires Opus + Thinking
ON deep session с atomic counters per-step (dispatched, resumed, exited)
для locating where fiber is lost. Possibly need to port Tokio's AtomicWaker
pattern полностью (вместо current cross-thread dispatch_ready hierarchy).

Branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver pushed но НЕ merged. [M-83.10.4-iso-
cancel-startup-race] STILL OPEN. Worktree D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-11
preserved для continuation. Diagnostic infrastructure готова.


=== Plan 83.11 Ф.3 continuation — 9 diag counters + futex + SEQ_CST (2026-05-27) ===

Continuation session per user "продолжай работать без остановок". Goal: locate
exact race point in wake-delivery chain через atomic counter diagnostic, apply
targeted fix.

DIAGNOSTIC ADDED (commit 6dc7ad39506 branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver):
- 9 atomic counters per delivery step: close_cb / wake_called / cas_won /
  dispatch_same|cross / worker_drained / park_resumed / pred_true / sleep_ret
- 5 futex-path counters (fastpath_break / cas_win / cas_lose / yield / resume)
- sysmon ticker prints diag ~1Hz (visible during TIMEOUT)

DIAG REVEALED loss point:
- close_cb=100 ✓, wake_called=100 ✓
- cas_won=89-97 — 3-11 wake CAS fails (parked false at CAS time)
- yield=100 — all fibers reach mco_yield
- resume=89-97 — 3-11 never resumed (lost wakes)

FIXES APPLIED:
1. _nova_sleep_via_driver: inline futex park (SEQ_CST parked + recheck +
   CAS-clear path) — Linux futex / Tokio AtomicWaker idiom
2. Driver close_cb: SEQ_CST store stage CLOSED (was RELEASE) — total order
   with worker's SEQ_CST parked

RESULTS (stress_iso_3e direct exe runs):
- 3/30 PASS baseline (no fixes)
- 13/30 PASS with counters (SEQ_CST counter inc adds fences)
- 19/30 PASS with futex pattern
- 15/30 PASS with futex + SEQ_CST stage (marginal)
- Plateau ~50% PASS — diminishing returns

REMAINING RACE: driver's wake CAS happens BEFORE worker's SEQ_CST parked in
some interleavings. Worker yields after, no future wake. SEQ_CST on stage
doesn't fix because it's different atomic.

FULL FIX requires Option 1 (port Tokio AtomicWaker fully, breaks fiber model)
или Option 2 (generational futex — wake_gen counter per slot). 1-2 dev-days
deep work.

CURRENT STATE:
- Architecture works (driver/single-mutator confirmed via diag)
- Wake delivery ~50% PASS — known flakiness
- Branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver advanced (6dc7ad39506 pushed)
- Worktree D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-11 preserved
- [M-83.10.4-iso-cancel-startup-race] STILL OPEN. NOT MERGED.

Diagnostic infrastructure готова — next session can quickly verify any fix
via stress_iso_3e + diag counter analysis.


=== Plan 83.11 Ф.3 — Session #3 (continuation #2): 3 fix attempts (2026-05-27) ===

3 architectural fix experiments после diag localized race на cas_won < 100:

1. **Unconditional dispatch** from close_cb (bypass CAS). 1/30 PASS — reverted.
   Hypothesis: double-dispatch race when fiber currently running.

2. **Generational futex** — wake_gen counter on NovaSleepState. Wake side incs
   gen unconditionally + CAS parked. Park snapshots gen before SEQ_CST parked,
   rechecks after. 1/30 PASS — reverted. Likely our dispatch_ready hierarchy
   has multiple race windows that gen counter alone can't close.

3. **Simple futex park + SEQ_CST stage CLOSED** — final state. 1-19/30 PASS,
   system-load dependent. Test flaky, NOT production.

INSIGHT: Half-port (TimerEntry state machine только) inadequate. Full Tokio
AtomicWaker + Future + poll paradigm нужен ВЕСЬ stack — несовместимо с current
fiber model.

Альтернатива: integrate wake_gen в nova_sched_park/wake LEVEL (generic API,
risky). Real fix needs deep design session или architectural rewrite.

STATE: branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver advanced (f580bfff775 pushed).
Diag infrastructure preserved. [M-83.10.4-iso-cancel-startup-race] STILL OPEN.
6 hours total on Plan 83.11 Ф.3 — ~50 hours estimated for production fix.

DECISION: stop, commit honest WIP, defer to dedicated Opus+Thinking ON session
с either full Tokio paradigm port OR nova_sched_park/wake-level wake_gen.

2026-05-27: Plan 90.1 — []T extend-family API + copy_from hardening SHIPPED.

Ключевые изменения:
- copy_from hardening: strict equal-length (src.len != dst.len → panic "length mismatch")
  + всегда memmove (overlap-safe). Breaking change: было silent truncation для src
  короче dst. Truncation idiom: dst[..n].copy_from(src[..n]) через D144 slicing.
- NEW: extend_from(src) — bulk append с 2x growth, memmove (self-extend safe)
- NEW: insert_from(i, src) — вставка пачкой по позиции [0,len], OOB panic, memmove tail
- NEW: reserve(extra) — preallocate hint, len unchanged, negative-extra panic
- W_VIEW_EXTEND_DETACH lint — предупреждает когда grow-метод вызван на parent
  после создания slice-view из него. Suppress: #allow(view_extend_detach)
- 20/20 nova_tests/plan90_1/ PASS (8 pos + 5 neg + 1 lint-warn + 2 prop + 2 stress + 3 lint-only)
- D141 spec amend: extend-family + overlap semantics + truncation idiom documented
- Forward-declarations в nova_rt.h для nv_panic_insert_oob + nv_panic_negative_reserve

Worktree: nova-p90-1, branch: plan-90.1-extend-family

=== Plan 83.11 Ф.3.A v2 — single-atomic wait_state (2026-05-27) ===

User approved single-atomic design after careful proposal. Design committed
as plan §11 (commit 9ba644f43ba on main).

IMPLEMENTATION (commit d5aaf9a2004 on plan-83.11-centralized-driver):
- NovaSleepWaitState enum: NEW/PARKED/WOKEN/CONSUMED
- wait_state field в NovaSleepState
- Worker park: CAS NEW→PARKED (authoritative) + parked[] for legacy compat
- Driver wake: CAS NEW→WOKEN OR PARKED→WOKEN, dispatch only PARKED case

RESULTS:
- **Pure single-atomic** (без parked[]): **SEGFAULT** — fiber stack overflow
  slot 0. Existing runtime tightly coupled к parked[] semantics: removing it
  breaks cancel_worker_fibers walks, count_parked, supervised_run_impl waits.
- **Hybrid** (wait_state + parked[]): **3/30 PASS**. Better stability but
  still doesn't close race fully.

ROOT CAUSE: design architecturally clean (single mutator → no cross-atomic
race), но implementation conflict с existing runtime expectations. Sleep-only
single-atomic не достаточно — нужен либо full integration с nova_sched_*
generic API, либо port Tokio Future+Waker model.

DECISION: stop, commit honest WIP. Plan 83.11 Ф.3 needs deeper architectural
session (estimated 2-5 dev-days). NOT MERGED. [M-83.10.4-iso-cancel-startup-
race] STILL OPEN. Worktree D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p83-11 preserved.

Total time on Plan 83.11 Ф.3: ~8 hours across 4 sessions. Race fundamentally
requires architectural rewrite, не incremental fix.


=== Plan 83.11 Ф.3.A v3 — Option A pending_wake integration (2026-05-27) ===

Session #5. User explicit: "продолжай работать по плану Option A сам без
остановок по всем оставшимся пунктам без упрощений (как для прода), я ушел".

DESIGN: plan §12 committed 3b4845f93b2 на main. Option A = integrate
pending_wake[] counter в generic nova_sched_park/wake API (vs §11 sleep-
only). Rationale: closes wake-before-park race для ALL primitives (sleep
+ channels + mutexes + Plan 103.x sync), не только sleep.

IMPLEMENTATION (commit 7336fdbc0af на plan-83.11-centralized-driver, NOT
MERGED):
- NovaSchedState.pending_wake[] field + alloc в grow_state + init в get_state
- nova_sched_park: 3 checkpoints около SEQ_CST parked store
  1. pre-check CAS pending_wake 1→0 — fast-path return без yield
  2. SEQ_CST parked=true — full fence
  3. post-barrier recheck CAS 1→0 — undo parked + return if wake came в окне
  4. mco_yield (если не fast-returned)
- nova_sched_wake: CAS pending_wake 0→1 (idempotent deliver) FIRST,
  then existing CAS parked true→false; if winning, clear pending_wake
- _nova_sleep_via_driver reverted к generic nova_sched_park_until
- driver close_cb reverted к standard nova_sched_wake
- wait_state field/enum removed (§11 v2 leftover)

RESULTS:
- **Stress 30× stress_iso_3e: 10 PASS / 14 FAIL (slow >300ms) / 6 TIMEOUT**
- Best partial result so far (vs §11 hybrid 3/30, Tactical 1-19/30)
- Does NOT meet acceptance criteria (target 30/30)
- 14 FAIL: cancel completed but >300ms — likely contention/cache pollution
- 6 TIMEOUT: residual deadlock path remains

PLAN §13 committed (0ca0485eb08 на main) с honest status + recommendation
для Option B (Tokio Future+Waker port, 2-4 dev-days dedicated Opus +
Thinking ON).

[M-83.10.4-iso-cancel-startup-race] STILL OPEN. Branch preserved для
continuation.

Cumulative Plan 83.11 Ф.3 time: ~10 hours / 5 sessions. Plateau confirmed.
Lesson: 6 attempts на same race surface (83.10.1-5 + 83.11 Ф.3) = definitive
signal that incremental fixes hit fundamental limit. Tokio rewrote их
entire runtime в 2020 ровно по этой причине.

=== Plan 91 Ф.2.6 closed 2026-05-28; D178 str API cleanup + extensions ===

Plan 91 Ф.2.6 (D178) CLOSED.
- @bytes() renamed to @to_bytes() (allocating copy; as_bytes() zero-copy unchanged)

=== Plan 91 Ф.2.6 amendment — D132 check_fluent_return refactor 2026-05-28 ===

Bug: StringBuilder @plus declared -> Self instead of -> @; fixed to -> @.
check_fluent_return refactored:
- body_always_returns_receiver: -> @ body can end with call to another -> @ method (delegation)
- Check 2 (new): -> Self where all paths return receiver -> E_FLUENT_SELF compile error
- fluent_wrapper_ok.nv (positive): @push => @write delegation + @plus chain 3/3 PASS
- fluent_self_instead_of_at_err.nv (negative): -> Self => @bump() -> E_FLUENT_SELF PASS
- 7/7 plan77 PASS

=== Plan 91 Ф.2.6 sub-phase (D179) CLOSED 2026-05-28: StringBuilder — pure Nova consume type ===

D179: StringBuilder implemented fully in Nova (sub-phase Plan 91 Ф.2.6).

type StringBuilder consume { mut buf []u8 }

Old C runtime (Nova_StringBuilder_* / Rust-backed String) removed.
All methods now Nova-body; single remaining external: append(c char)
encoding handled via Nova bitwise ops. str.from_bytes_* and UTF-8
helpers remain in string_builder.h as utility functions.

API changes vs pre-109:
  @byte_len() removed (dup of @len)
  @peek() removed (unsound: pointer aliasing with realloc)
  @into() renamed → @to_str() (consume)
  @append_bytes(arr) → @append_bytes(readonly arr)
  @len() → bytes O(1); @char_len() new O(n) UTF-8 codepoints
  StringBuilder.from(c char), .from(s str), .with_capacity constructors

Codegen fixes (emit_c.rs):
  lhs_is_nova_ptr guard: sb + "hello" now dispatches @plus not nova_str_concat
  types/mod.rs: resolve_instance_method arity hint: name-only fallback
    filters by arg count — prevents false "expected 0, got 1" when
    user type shadows built-in method name (e.g. Buf::push 0-params
    vs array push 1-param where array methods not in method_table)

Tests: plan77 7/7, plan73 12/12, plan62 31/36 (+28 vs main 3/36),
  plan108 6/6, plan11_followup, base64, csv, display, property.
Commit: aad35ad1b99 (branch plan-91-stdmvp)

=== Plan 83.11 Ф.3 COMPLETE: STALE-slot race fix (2026-05-28) ===

Root cause confirmed после 6 sessions (~10+ hours) investigation:
STALE slot condition — `fibers[slot]=NULL` while `parked[slot]=true`.
Original fiber stuck in mco_yield, close_cb saw WRONG-FIBER (NULL vs
expected_co) and skipped wake → supervised hang indefinitely.

Fix A (nova_sched.h / nova_scope_free_slot): skip slots where
`parked[slot]=true` — STALE detection. Prevents slot reuse while
original fiber still in mco_yield.

Fix B (driver.c / _nova_driver_sleep_close_cb): when WRONG-FIBER
detected, dispatch expected_co directly (not actual_co=NULL).
Clears parked[] and pending_wake[], sets DISPLACED sentinel (-2),
then dispatch_ready(expected_co).

Fix C (epilogue / _nova_worker_slot): DISPLACED sentinel
`_nova_worker_slot=-2` causes epilogue to skip free_slot for
displaced fiber, preventing double free_slot.

Verification: stress_iso_3e.c × 30 runs → 30/30 PASS (was 3-5/30 before).
Concurrency suite: 74-75/78 PASS; 3-4 flaky are pre-existing WIP branch
failures (cancel_negative_behavior_test, deep_spawn, supervised_cancel_test,
time_handler).

Diagnostic cleanup (same commit): removed ~30 _nova_diag_* atomic counters,
nova_diag_drv_print(), all fprintf debug prints from 6 files
(runtime.c/h, driver.c, nova_sched.h, fibers.h, emit_c.rs).

Commit: dd7a4f00bc5 "fix(plan83.11 Ф.3): STALE-slot race fix + remove
diagnostic instrumentation" on branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver.

Ф.4-Ф.9 pending (blocking pool migration, cancel migration, perf, tests).

=== Plan 91.8a.2 part 3 expanded 2026-05-29: operators dispatch через @compare ===

Major value delivery — D183 amendment + 91.8b теперь рабочий MVP для types implementing Comparable:

emit_c.rs::BinOp dispatch (line 14377+):
- == / != synthesis: type with @compare но без @eq/@equals →
  (Nova_T_method_compare(l, r) == 0) / != 0
- < / <= / > / >= synthesis: type with @compare →
  (Nova_T_method_compare(l, r) op 0)

Раньше:
- == для record types без @eq падал в codegen (records have no ->tag)
- < для Nova_T* fallback на pointer comparison (semantically broken — heap order dependent)

Сейчас:
- Type with @compare automatically gets все 6 comparison operators
- Single @compare enough — no need для @lt/@le/@gt/@ge/@eq/@equals magic methods
- D183 vision: minimal implementer surface, maximal user value

Test operators_via_compare_test (4 sub-tests PASS):
- a < b через @compare
- b > a через @compare
- a <= b и a >= b
- == / != через @compare когда type has only @compare

plan91_8a_2: 8/8 PASS (7 positive + 1 negative)
Wide regression: plan62 31/5, plan91 17/0, plan91_7 5/0, plan91_8a 10/0,
protocols 27/2, syntax 59/2, plan73 12/0, plan77 7/0, plan108 6/0,
plan65 19/0 — all baseline.

=== Plan 91.8a.2 part 3 final 2026-05-29: DELETE magic comparison methods @eq/@lt/@le/@gt/@ge ===

Per user decision (2026-05-29): не deprecate, DELETE.

Удалены из stdlib:
- std/time/duration.nv: Duration/Timestamp/Monotonic — 15 magic methods → 3 @compare
- std/runtime/string.nv: str — 5 external magic methods (str.@compare из D178 покрывает)
- nova_tests/protocols/comparison/equatable.nv: Point @eq removed

Размер reduction: 15+5 = 20 magic method declarations удалены, заменены 3 @compare declarations.

emit_c.rs BinOp::Eq dispatch:
- Try @equals (canonical D183) → @eq (legacy compat) → @compare synthesis (Equatable default)
- @eq fallback оставлен для compatibility с user-code до миграции (но stdlib чист)

Принцип D183: single explicit method даёт ALL 6 operators через synthesis.
- @equals → ==/!=
- @compare → ==/!=/</<=/>/>= (через @compare synthesis)

=== Plan 91.8a.2 part 3 continuation 2026-05-29: char @compare + primitive dispatch fix ===

User-requested: char operations через @compare.

1. char @compare (codepoint-based ordering):
   - std/runtime/defaults.nv: export fn char @compare(other char) -> int
   - Signum form для overflow safety
   - Native operators (< > <= >= == !=) уже работали для char, теперь дополнительно
     a.compare(b) direct call

2. Primitive method dispatch fix (M-method-receivers-primitive-disambiguation):
   - method_receivers single-key collision: str.compare и char.compare обе
     registered под "compare" → last-wins picks str blindly
   - Раньше: char obj → method_receivers['compare'] = str → Nova_str_method_compare
     с char args → CC linker error
   - Сейчас: primitive obj_ty (nova_char/bool/f32/f64) ROUTES к
     Nova_<primitive>_method_<X> directly через all_methods registry
   - Closes regression для всех primitive method dispatch с collision

3. receiver_c_type: char → nova_char (was missing)

Tests plan91_8a_2/char_compare_test (7 sub-tests PASS):
- Native operators < > <= >= == != на char
- Range checks (digit, lower, upper predicates)
- char.compare direct method call

modules 32/0, named_params 8/0 — все baseline. Pre-existing fails: protocols 26/3,

=== Plan 91.8c part 1 closed 2026-05-29: generic [T Comparable] array algorithms ===

D185 first delivery — generic min_of/max_of/sort_of/binary_search_of в std/sort.nv.

Foundation: Plan 91.8a.2 (primitives в bound + dispatch fix).

std/sort.nv additions:
- fn[T Comparable] []T @min_of() -> Option[T]
- fn[T Comparable] []T @max_of() -> Option[T]
- fn[T Comparable] []T mut @sort_of() -> @ (insertion sort, O(n²))
- fn[T Comparable] []T @binary_search_of(target T) -> Option[int] (O(log n))

Naming distinct из concrete (@sort/@min/@max/@binary_search для []int):
- Concrete fast-path для int (no mono overhead)
- Generic _of-suffix для arbitrary [T Comparable]

Implementation note:
- Intermediate bindings (let v = @[i]) вместо direct @[i].method()
- mono pass для direct array-index + method call has issue —
  followup [M-91.8c-direct-index-method]

Tests plan91_8c (10 sub-tests PASS):
- min_of/max_of для int/str/empty
- sort_of int/str/empty/single
- binary_search_of int/str/not_found
- pipeline sort_of + binary_search_of

plan91_8c: 2/2 PASS
Regression baseline maintained: plan91 21/0, plan65 19/0, plan91_8a 12/0,
plan91_8a_2 10/0, plan73 12/0, plan77 7/0, plan108 6/0, modules 32/0.

Followups:
- [M-91.8c-direct-index-method]: direct @[i].method() dispatch в mono

  для arbitrary T если concrete не объявлен)

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: Printable.fmt MVP synthesis ===

Зеркало Equatable.equals MVP fallback'a в emit_c.rs для Printable.fmt:
- Trigger: obj.fmt(sb) где method == "fmt" && args.len() == 1
- Eligibility: obj's type T БЕЗ explicit @fmt
- Resolution priority:
  1. method_overloads[("str","from")] — static overload с param_c_types[0] == T_c_type
  2. into_targets[T] == "str" — D73/D77 @into() -> str chain
- Emit: Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb_c, <str_expr>)
  где str_expr = либо <c_name>(obj_c) либо Nova_<T>_method_into(obj_c)

Положен сразу после @equals fallback на line ~18813. Same pattern, same
discipline (inline emission без synthesized function; cache + Plan 101
mono extension — followup [M-91.8a.2-default-body-general]).

Test plan91_8a_2/printable_fmt_synthesis_test (2 sub-tests PASS):
- Money satisfies Printable bound через `fn Money @into() -> str` (D73)
- Multi-step composition с explicit sb.append вокруг synthesized fmt

Verified generated C:
  static nova_unit ...show____Nova_Money_p(Nova_Money* x, Nova_StringBuilder* sb) {
      Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb, Nova_Money_method_into(x));
      return NOVA_UNIT;
  }

Альтернативный path через `fn str.from(T) -> str` overload реализован
в коде но не покрыт тестом из-за pre-existing issue: declaring
`fn str.from(UserType) -> str` ломает type-check Printable.fmt default
body на protocol decl level (`str.from(@)` где @ — Self abstract).
Та же причина у baseline-fail nova_tests/syntax/methods_on_primitives.nv
(declares `fn str.from(b bool) -> str`). Followup [M-fmt-synthesis-str-from-overload].

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: f1_check_call false-positive fix для primitive receivers ===

Closes [M-fmt-synthesis-str-from-overload] и pre-existing baseline-fail
methods_on_primitives.nv (syntax 57/2 → 58/1).

Bug: type-checker's `f1_check_call` (types/mod.rs:2030+) для Path-формы
`Type.method(args)` делает arg-type check когда в method_table ровно ОДИН
overload. Но для primitive-receiver'ов (str, int, char, ...) часть
overload'ов живёт ВНЕ method_table:
- external fn в другом stdlib-модуле (char.nv `external fn str.from(c char)`)
- codegen builtins (str.from(int) hardcoded в emit_c.rs)
- D73 auto-derive paths

Symptom: пользователь объявил `fn str.from(b bool) -> str` в своём модуле.
method_table["str"]["from"] = [bool overload] — единственный. Type-checker
walks std/runtime/string.nv `pad_left` body, видит `let fill_s = str.from(fill)`
с `fill: char`, резолвит к bool overload, ругается «cannot pass char as bool».
То же при объявлении `fn str.from(m Money) -> str`.

Fix: в f1_check_call ExprKind::Path branch — если parts[0] is primitive type
(str/int/char/bool/f32/f64/u*/i*/uint), сразу `return` без arg-check.
Codegen overload resolution (external_registry + method_overloads + D77
auto-derive в emit_c.rs) выполняет полный поиск, type-checker'у не нужно
дублировать.

Tradeoff: false-negatives на primitive receivers (wrong arg types слипнутся
до codegen). Acceptable — codegen в итоге всё равно фильтрует.

Test plan91_8a_2/printable_fmt_synthesis_test:
- Расширен до 3 sub-tests (было 2):
  1. Money satisfies Printable via `fn str.from(Money) -> str` (NEW path)
  2. Coin satisfies Printable via `fn Coin @into() -> str` (existing)
  3. Multi-step composition

Generated C verified — оба path работают:
- Money: Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb, Nova_str_static_from__Nova_Money_p(x))
- Coin:  Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb, Nova_Coin_method_into(x))

Regression sweep:
- syntax: 58/1 (было 57/2; methods_on_primitives 1.0 PASS)
- plan91_8a_2: 11/0 (test расширен с 2 до 3 sub-tests)
- plan62 31/5, plan65 19/0, plan73 12/0, plan77 7/0, plan108 6/0
- plan91_7 5/0, plan91_8a 2/0, plan91_8c 6/0
- basics 8/0, modules 31/0, protocols 25/1 (flaky from_multi)

Closes [M-fmt-synthesis-str-from-overload] which was opened в предыдущем
commit (3865300c7de) что fmt synthesis path 1 (str.from overload) нельзя
протестировать из-за этой baseline-failure.

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: protocol coercion via vtable (MVP) ===

`let x Printable = m` теперь работает — coercion в protocol-тип создаёт
fat pointer (data + vtable), virtual dispatch через `x.fmt(sb)`
diff'ит к correct concrete-method без compile-time knowledge of T.

Два fix'a:

1. emit_c.rs Stmt::Let (line ~13232): убрана условие
   `!type_args.is_empty()` для emit_protocol_vtable_companion. Plan 97.1
   уже сделал generation infrastructure non-generic-protocol-aware (для
   typedef + vtable struct), но assignment site дублировал ограничение и
   silently fell through на `NovaBox_P x = m;` (invalid C).

2. emit_c.rs emit_protocol_vtable_companion (line ~3594): thunk emission
   получил synthesis fallback. Раньше thunk звал `Nova_T_method_X` напрямую
   — функция могла не существовать если T satisfies protocol через default
   body. Теперь:
   - method == "equals" + T has @compare → thunk emits
     `return (Nova_T_method_compare((T*)self, a0) == 0)` (Equatable default)
   - method == "fmt" + T has `fn str.from(T) -> str` overload → thunk emits
     `Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(a0, Nova_str_static_from__T_p(...)); return NOVA_UNIT`
   - method == "fmt" + T has @into() -> str → thunk emits
     `Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(a0, Nova_T_method_into(...)); return NOVA_UNIT`

Mirror existing bare-call synthesis fallback в method dispatch (line 18814).
Same MVP discipline: hardcoded для двух protocols (Equatable/Printable).

Tests plan91_8a_2/coercion_test (3 sub-tests PASS):
- Money coerced to Printable via str.from(Money), virtual fmt() — works
- Coin coerced to Printable via @into→str, virtual fmt() — works
- Multiple Printable values composed в same StringBuilder — works

Generated C verified:
  NovaBox_Printable x = { .data = (void*)(m), .vtable = &_vt_Printable__Money };
  /* thunk */
  static nova_unit _thunk_Printable_fmt__Money(void* self, Nova_StringBuilder* a0) {
      Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(a0,
          Nova_str_static_from__Nova_Money_p((Nova_Money*)self));
      return NOVA_UNIT;
  }
  /* virtual dispatch */
  x.vtable->fmt(x.data, sb);

NOT в scope MVP:
- Coercion с Self-typed params (Equatable.equals(other Self)) — vtable
  struct lowers Self → drops the param из signature, но thunk эмитит с
  full Self-resolved type → arity mismatch. Followup
  [M-91.8a.2-vtable-self-in-param]: lower Self → void* в vtable struct
  + thunk cast + call-site unwrap eb.data.
- `[]Printable` heterogeneous array (substantial array-of-fat-pointer infra)
- `"${m}"` interpolation через Printable (Plan 91.10)

Coverage matrix:
| Pattern | Status |
|---|---|
| `[T Printable]` / `[T Equatable]` bound | ✅ |
| Bare `m.fmt(sb)` / `m.equals(other)` | ✅ |
| `let x Printable = m` coercion (params без Self) | ✅ (этот commit) |
| `let x Equatable = m` coercion (params с Self) | ❌ M-vtable-self-in-param |
| `[]Printable` heterogeneous | ❌ |
| `"${m}"` interpolation | ❌ Plan 91.10 |

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: Equatable coercion (Self-in-param) ===

Closes [M-91.8a.2-vtable-self-in-param]. `let x Equatable = m`,
`x.equals(y)` теперь работает: codegen lowers `Self`-typed params в
vtable struct к `void*`, thunk casts back в concrete, call site
unwraps NovaBox arg к `.data` если arg тоже коэрсирован.

Три fix'a в emit_c.rs:

1. emit_protocol_box_typedef (vtable struct emission, line ~3742):
   `Self`-typed params теперь lower к `"void*"` (раньше silently
   dropped — `type_ref_to_c(Self)` без current_receiver_type
   errored → param исключался из vtable struct signature).

2. emit_protocol_vtable_companion (thunk emission, line ~3585):
   per-param spec `(vtable_sig_type, is_self_typed)`:
   - Self params: sig="void*"; fwd cast `(concrete_c_ty)a{i}`.
   - Non-Self: sig=concrete type; fwd `a{i}` без cast.
   Synthesis fallback equals также emits `(concrete_c_ty)a0` cast.

3. Method dispatch на NovaBox-typed var (line ~18193): args типа
   NovaBox_<Proto> unwrap'аются к `.data` перед передачей в vtable
   call. Concrete-type args передаются as-is.

Test plan91_8a_2/coercion_equatable_test (2 sub-tests PASS):
- Score → Equatable; ea.equals(eb) virtual dispatch where both
  operands are NovaBox_Equatable — works
- ea.equals(b) where b is concrete Score (no coercion) — works

Generated C verified:
  /* vtable struct */
  typedef struct NovaVtable_Equatable {
      nova_bool (*equals)(void*, void*);
  } NovaVtable_Equatable;
  /* thunk */
  static nova_bool _thunk_Equatable_equals__Score(void* self, void* a0) {
      return (Nova_Score_method_compare((Nova_Score*)self, (Nova_Score*)a0) == 0);
  }
  /* call site — both args coerced */
  ea.vtable->equals(ea.data, (eb).data)
  /* call site — RHS concrete (no unwrap) */
  ea.vtable->equals(ea.data, b)

Coverage matrix теперь:

|---|---|

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: heterogeneous []Protocol arrays ===

`let xs []Printable = [money, coin, tag]` теперь работает. Mixed-type
storage через NovaArray_void_p slots, каждый slot — heap-alloc'd
NovaBox_<Proto>* (fat pointer). For-loop deref'ит slot к value, virtual
dispatch per-element правильно резолвит концерт type через vtable.

emit_c.rs изменения:

1. Field current_array_protocol_box: Option<(String, Vec<String>)>
   (proto_name, type_args) — set transiently при let-decl с `[]Protocol`
   annotation.

2. Stmt::Let (~13247): detect annotation TypeRef::Array(inner) где
   inner — protocol. Pre-emit typedef через emit_protocol_box_typedef.
   Set current_array_protocol_box. Override ty_c к "NovaArray_void_p*".
   Restore field после emit_expr_with_target_type.

3. emit_array_lit (~21940): special-case в начале — если
   current_array_protocol_box set:
   - elem_ty = void_p (uniform slot storage)
   - per-element: box value via box_value_for_protocol → heap-alloc
     NovaBox_<P>* → push pointer к void_p slot
   - array_element_types[tmp] = "NovaBox_<P>*"
   Spread элементы НЕ поддерживаются в MVP (followup).

4. For-loop emission (~20510): расширил value-deref pattern для
   NovaBox_<P>* element type. Слот хранит pointer к heap-alloc'd box;
   loop var получает value: `NovaBox_<P> x = *(NovaBox_<P>*)slot`.
   Тогда метод dispatch на NovaBox_-typed var (~18187) работает
   корректно (x.vtable->method(x.data, ...)).

Test plan91_8a_2/heterogeneous_array_test (3 sub-tests PASS):
- []Printable с Money + Coin + Tag, iterate + fmt — works
- Single-element []Printable — works
- Empty []Printable — for-loop не выполняется

Generated C verified:
  NovaArray_void_p* xs = nova_array_new_void_p(3);
  NovaBox_Printable* t0 = (NovaBox_Printable*)nova_alloc(sizeof(NovaBox_Printable));
  *t0 = (NovaBox_Printable){ .data = (void*)(m), .vtable = &_vt_Printable__Money };
  nova_array_push_void_p(xs, (void*)t0);
  /* ... same для Coin, Tag ... */
  for (nova_int i = 0; i < xs->len; i++) {
      NovaBox_Printable x = *(NovaBox_Printable*)xs->data[i];
      x.vtable->fmt(x.data, sb);
  }

=== Plan 91.8a.2 followup 2026-05-29: interpolation "${m}" через Printable ===

String interpolation `"${m}"` теперь поддерживает user types через все
три Printable paths:
- Path 1: explicit `fn T @fmt(sb StringBuilder)` — **direct call** в
  interpolation's StringBuilder (zero-overhead, no intermediate str)
- Path 2: `fn str.from(T) -> str` overload — append результат
- Path 3: `fn T @into() -> str` — append результат

emit_c.rs::emit_interpolated_str (~20338) изменения:
1. До match arg_ty — check user type (non-primitive, non-charlit) на
   explicit @fmt. Если есть — emit `Nova_T_method_fmt(v, sb)` напрямую
   и continue (skip append step).
2. В user-type fallback расширил resolution priority:
   1) method_overloads[("str","from")] static с param[0]==arg_ty
   2) into_targets[T] == "str" — D77 chain
   3) fallback `nova_int_to_str((nova_int)v)` (junk — каб CC-FAIL для
      unsupported types)

Test plan91_8a_2/interpolation_printable_test (4 sub-tests PASS):
- "${m}" with `fn str.from(Money)` overload → works
- "${c}" with `fn Coin @into() -> str` → works
- "${p}" with explicit `fn Point @fmt(sb)` → works (direct fmt call)
- Multiple interpolations в одной строке — works

Generated C verified:
- Money: `Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb, Nova_str_static_from__Nova_Money_p(m))`
- Coin:  `Nova_StringBuilder_method_append(sb, Nova_Coin_method_into(c))`
- Point: `Nova_Point_method_fmt(p, sb)` ← direct, no intermediate str

Coverage matrix теперь ПОЛНОСТЬЮ ЗАКРЫТА:
| Pattern | Status |
|---|---|
| `[T Protocol]` bound | ✅ |

=== Plan 91.8a.2 [M-91.8a.2-default-body-general] CLOSED 2026-05-29 ===

Production-grade generalized default body synthesis. Replaces ALL hardcoded
equals/fmt MVP fallbacks с единым AST-driven synthesizer:
ANY protocol method с default_body теперь автоматически работает для типа T
если body's referenced calls resolve для T. Нет hardcoded списка.

emit_c.rs новая инфраструктура:

1. `try_synthesize_default_method(t_name, t_c_ty, method_name) -> Option<String>`
   (line ~3458). Production helper:
   - Cache via `synthesized_default_methods: HashSet<(String, String)>`
   - Cycle detection via `synthesizing_default_methods` active set
   - Iterates `protocol_method_registry`, finds candidates с default_body
   - Trial emission per candidate: snapshot state → set current_receiver_type
     → resolve return/param types (Self → t_c_ty) → emit_block(body) →
     если success, push в mono_fwd_decls + register в method_overloads /
     all_methods / method_receivers maps
   - Fail → rollback state, try next protocol
   - Registry update делает synthesized method visible для inference в
     других вызовах (`let s = u.greet()` получает правильный return c-type).

2. `try_emit_default_body_candidates` (helper inside) — single attempt
   per candidate с full state save/restore.

3. `emit_default_body_as_return` — unit body emit'ит discard + return
   NOVA_UNIT; non-unit body требует trailing expr → return v;.

emit_c.rs replacement of MVPs:

1. Method dispatch fallback (line ~19187): hardcoded equals + fmt blocks
   удалены — single call к `try_synthesize_default_method`.
2. Vtable thunk emission (line ~3641): pre-synthesis call → thunk forwards.
3. Interpolation `"${m}"` codegen (line ~20400+): single try_synthesize_default_method
   call returns Nova_T_method_fmt name; direct call в interp_sb (zero-alloc).
4. infer_expr_c_type (line ~25612): generalized — walks protocol_method_registry
   for method's return type из protocol declaration.

types/mod.rs replacement:

5. `f3_check_member` (line ~2195): general `protocol_method_satisfiable_for`
   helper + AST walker (`walk_default_body_*`) проверяет что body's
   referenced calls resolve для T (T provides @method или satisfies
   well-known auto-derive `str.from(T)`).

Test plan91_8a_2/general_synthesis_test (2 sub-tests PASS):
- Greetable.greet via User.@name — bare call works
- Generic bound [T Greetable] — synthesized method dispatches

Generated C for Greetable.greet on User:
  static nova_str Nova_User_method_greet(Nova_User* nova_self);
  static nova_str Nova_User_method_greet(Nova_User* nova_self) {
      return (nova_str_concat((nova_str){.ptr="Hello, ", .len=7},
                              Nova_User_method_name(nova_self)));
  }

Properties:
- ANY new protocol с default body работает без modification compiler
- Cycle detection (E_SYNTH_CYCLE) встроен (active synthesizing set)
- First-match ambiguity resolution (multiple protocols same name → first in registry)
- Snapshot/rollback на failed trial — no partial state leak
- Cache discipline: one emission per (T, method) pair
- Type inference + method dispatch + vtable + interpolation все используют
  one unified path

Coverage matrix теперь TRULY GENERAL (не специальные case-by-case):
| Pattern | Status |
|---|---|
| `[T Protocol]` bound | ✅ general |
| Bare `m.method(...)` без bound | ✅ general |
| `let x Protocol = m` coercion | ✅ general |
| `[]Protocol` heterogeneous | ✅ general |
| `"${m}"` interpolation | ✅ general |
| NEW protocol with default body works automatically | ✅ verified |

Regression:
- plan91_8a_2: 17/0 PASS (+1 general_synthesis_test 2 sub-tests)
- syntax 58/1, plan62 31/5, plan65 19/0, plan73 12/0, plan77 7/0
- plan108 6/0, plan91_7 5/0, plan91_8a 2/0, plan91_8c 6/0, plan91 2/0

  general synthesis section

=== Plan 91.9 (D186) CLOSED 2026-05-29: #impl(P + Q + ...) opt-in annotation ===

Gates bare-call protocol synthesis на explicit `#impl(...)` opt-in.
Replaces TypeScript-style implicit structural magic с Rust/Java-style
explicit opt-in. Use-sites bound `[T P]` + coercion `let x P = u`
остаются structural (user explicitly opts at use-site).

Mental model:
- Хочешь чтобы `u.greet()` работал? Объяви `#impl(Greetable) type User`.
- Хочешь `[T Greetable](u)` или `let g Greetable = u`? Это работает без #impl
  (use-site нашего согласие).

Syntax:
  #impl(Equatable + Comparable + Printable)
  type Coin { value int }

Multiple protocols via `+` consistent с multi-bound `[T A + B]`.

AST (ast/mod.rs):
- TypeDecl.impl_protocols: Vec<String> — list of opted-in protocol names

Parser (parser/mod.rs):
- parse_type_attrs returns (Vec<TypeAttr>, Vec<String>)
- `#impl(N1 + N2 + ...)` syntax recognized before type decl

Codegen (emit_c.rs):
- New field `type_impl_protocols: HashMap<String, HashSet<String>>` populated
  in forward-decl pass
- `try_synthesize_default_method` now wraps two variants:
  - `try_synthesize_default_method_with_gate(t, c, m, gate_on_impl)` —
    when gate_on_impl=true, restricts candidates к protocols в
    type_impl_protocols[t]
  - Method dispatch fallback: gate_on_impl=true (bare call)
  - Interpolation: gate_on_impl=true
  - Vtable thunk: gate_on_impl=false (coercion = explicit opt-in)

Type-checker (types/mod.rs):
- `protocol_method_satisfiable_for` gates via td.impl_protocols list

Migration:
- All existing bare-call tests в plan91_8a_2/ migrated с `#impl(...)`:
  - bare_call_synthesis_test (Score/Money/Coin)
  - general_synthesis_test (User)
  - printable_fmt_synthesis_test (Money/Coin)
  - interpolation_printable_test (Money/Coin/Point)
  - bound_satisfaction_default_test (Money)
  - synthesis_via_bound_test (Score)

New test plan91_8a_2/impl_optin_test (3 sub-tests PASS):
- `#impl(Greetable)`: bare call works
- `#impl(A + B + C)`: multi-protocol opt-in (Coin satisfies 3 protocols)
- Generic bound mono'd through opted-in type — works

Ideological correctness:
- Bare call = nominal opt-in (RFC-like; explicit author intent)
- Bound / coercion / interpolation through opted-in = explicit user opt-in
- Hidden methods от protocols никогда «магически» не появляются

Regression:
- plan91_8a_2: 18/0 PASS (+1 impl_optin + 6 migrated)
- syntax 58/1, plan62 31/5, plan65 19/0, plan73 12/0, plan77 7/0
- plan108 6/0, plan91_7 5/0, plan91_8a 2/0, plan91_8c 6/0, plan91 2/0
- basics 8/0, modules 31/0, protocols 24/2 (flaky)

Followups для D186 completeness:
- Verification pass (`#impl(P)` but missing P methods → E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS)
- E_UNKNOWN_PROTOCOL diagnostic
- nova doc integration showing `implements: P, Q, R`

Commit: TBD

=== Plan 91.9 (D186) followup 2026-05-29: verification pass added ===

Дополняет gate-семантику auto-verification: при объявлении type T с
`#impl(P1 + P2 + ...)` compiler проверяет, что T удовлетворяет каждому P
**в точке декларации** (не при использовании).

types/mod.rs::verify_impl_protocols (new method):
- E_UNKNOWN_PROTOCOL: `#impl(NonExistent)` — name not a known type
- E_IMPL_NOT_PROTOCOL: `#impl(SomeRecord)` — not a protocol kind
- E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS: T claims #impl(P) но missing P's required method(s).
  Caller получает listing missing signatures + hint про default-body
  dependencies.

Per-method check:
- T provides explicit `fn T @method(...)` → ok.
- P method has default_body → check via `default_body_calls_satisfy_for`
  (same AST walker used for bare-call satisfiability).
- Both fail → method listed в error.

Test plan91_8a_2/impl_verification_test (2 sub-tests PASS):
- `#impl(Greetable)` verified — User имеет @name → Greetable.greet синтез
- `#impl(Equatable + Comparable + Printable)` multi — Coin satisfies all

Negative test plan91_8a_2/impl_missing_methods_err (EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR
E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS): `#impl(Greetable) type Empty {}` без @name →
error at type-decl site:
  [E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS] type `Empty` claims `#impl(Greetable)` but
  is missing required method(s):
    - greet() -> str
  note: implement these directly, e.g. `fn Empty @<method>(...) -> ... => ...`,
  or ensure dependencies for a default body...

Plan 91.9 (D186) coverage итог:
- `#impl(P + Q + ...)` syntax ✅
- gate-семантика: bare-call / interpolation требуют #impl ✅
- structural: bound / coercion / cast `as P` / param `[]P` остаются automatic ✅
- verification: E_IMPL_MISSING_METHODS / E_UNKNOWN_PROTOCOL / E_IMPL_NOT_PROTOCOL ✅
- Migration 6 existing tests с `#impl(...)` ✅

- nova doc «implements: P, Q, R» integration

=== Plan 113 CLOSED 2026-05-30: #realtime / #blocking attribute-only simplification ===

Plan 113 объединяет `#realtime_safe` attribute и block-формы `realtime { }` /
`blocking { }` в один механизм — attribute на функции. Это unblock'ит Plan 110
(scoped-resources), который требует чистого attribute-only API.

Что сделано (Ф.0–Ф.5):
- Ф.0 audit: ~372 `#realtime_safe` использований, ~50 `realtime{}/blocking{}` блоков
- Ф.1 mass rename `#realtime_safe` → `#realtime` (callee guarantee — fn body
  может вызывать только другие `#realtime` fns/primitives, парковка в body
  забанена)
- Ф.2 spec: D172 amend (callee-guarantee model) + D64 retract block-form
- Ф.3 compiler:
  * parser: `realtime { }` / `blocking { }` → `[D172-block-form-removed]` ошибка
    при парсинге, с подсказкой migrate в `#realtime fn` / `#blocking fn`
  * codegen: новый `emit_blocking_fn_call` — генерирует ctx-struct + work-fn +
    call-site offload для `#blocking fn`; в `emit_fn` теперь устанавливаются
    флаги `in_realtime` / `in_blocking` для body restriction enforcement
  * parser fix: `#realtime nogc\nfn foo()` — `parse_sync_class_attr` съедал
    `#realtime`, оставляя `nogc` ident болтаться. Добавил consume `nogc` в
    `parse_item` + промоция в `RealtimeAttr::RealtimeNogc`
- Ф.4 migration ~47 фикстур:
  * Group 1 (10 файлов): EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR обновлены на `D172-block-form-removed`
  * Group 2 (19 файлов): negative tests `realtime { ... }` → `#realtime fn` helper
  * Group 3 (10 файлов): positive `realtime { ... }` → `#realtime fn` helper
  * Group 4 (3 файла): positive `blocking { ... }` → `#blocking fn` helper
  * Group 5 (4 файла): concurrency/blocking_* — переписаны на parameter-passing
    (вместо capture semantics, которые `blocking { }` поддерживал)
  * Group 6 (1 файл): effects/forbid_realtime
- Ф.5 regression:
  * full nova test 1559 PASS / 74 FAIL / 56 SKIP (release clang)
  * verification: stash моих compiler changes → plan103_3 baseline 7 fails;
    с моими changes 6 fails. Регрессии нет — это pre-existing M:N flakiness
    (Plan 83.11 known).
  * Все pre-existing failures (74) — buffers/str_builder/plan100.3/plan107/
    plan99/plan62/runtime/types/expected_runtime — НЕ затронуты Plan 113
    (compiler changes только в realtime/blocking codegen path).

Файлы (compiler):
- compiler-codegen/src/ast/mod.rs
- compiler-codegen/src/parser/mod.rs
- compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs
- compiler-codegen/src/codegen/sum_schema_registry.rs

Acceptance A1–A8 — все ✅. Plan 113 разблокирует Plan 110.

Подробности — docs/plans/113-realtime-blocking-attribute-only.md (статус таблица + A1–A8 evidence).

2026-05-28  Plan 73.1 — `consume` binding syntax (D180 V2 extension)
===============================================================================

Worktree: nova-p73, branch plan-73-v2

D180 spec (~245 lines в spec/decisions/05-memory.md) расширяет D131
(consume на receiver/param) на let-binding site:
- Rule 1: `consume X = expr` обязателен на consume-обязательном RHS
  → E_CONSUME_KEYWORD_MISSING + machine-applicable Suggestion (replace
  let → consume)
- Rule 2: `let Y = consume_var` (alias) запрещён в теле fn
  → E_VIEW_BINDING_FORBIDDEN + Suggestion; views ТОЛЬКО как function-params
- Rule 3: `consume Y = consume_var` = MOVE (source dead, Y owns)
- Rule 4: `consume mut X` parser-reject preserved (D131 carry)
- Rule 5/6: view-param lifetime / consume-scope check (D157/D131 carry)

Production-grade gate без shortcut'ов:
- Type-checker enforcement в consume_walk_stmt::Stmt::Let (real flow)
- Span precision (suggestion targets `let` keyword position)
- Plan 50 D102 diagnostic format

Test results:
- plan73/ (existing): 12/12 PASS (2 файла rewritten на move-semantics)
- plan73_1/ (new): 8/8 PASS (5 positive + 3 negative)
- plan100/: 150/13 (0 регрессий vs baseline)
- plan103_9/: 20/0 PASS
- concurrency/sync_*: 8/0 PASS

Stdlib migration:
- std/runtime/string_builder.nv:45 — StringBuilder.from(c char) rewritten
  старый `let mut sb = StringBuilder.new(); sb.append(c)` нарушал D180
  (sb не consumed при implicit fluent return Plan 77 D132). Delegate:
  `from(c) => from(str.from(c))` — semantic identity preserved.

Honest-defer markers (НЕ silent):
- [M-73.1-warning-needs-project-wide-registry] — W_CONSUME_KEYWORD_UNNECESSARY
  removed V1 (cross-module false positives). V2: project-wide consume_types
  registry.
- [M-73.1-cross-module-consume-detection] — E_CONSUME_KEYWORD_MISSING
  conservative (consistent с D131 §«Границы» — false-negative permissive).
- [M-73.1-fluent-return-implicit-consume] — Plan 77 D132 `-> @` fluent
  не помечает source Consumed.
- [M-73.1-property-tests] — 3 property tests deferred.
- [M-73.1-user-doc] / [M-73.1-migration-guide] — user-facing docs deferred.

Spec: D180 finalized (не draft) — это новый D-блок (не amend D131).
D-block numbering: D175-D179 заняты; D180 next free.

Plan 73.1 ✅ ЗАКРЫТ. 7 commits на ветке plan-73-v2.

  for mut + per-name pattern mut + запрет group-mut E_PATTERN_GROUP_MUT.
- AST: Pattern::Ident { ..., is_mut: bool } новое поле.
- Parser: parse_pattern принимает 'mut name' (per-name).
  parse_let_decl: 'let mut (a, b)' → E_PATTERN_GROUP_MUT.
  parse_for: 'for mut x' инжектит is_mut в Pattern::Ident.
- Type-checker:
  - consume_pattern_names_with_mut helper → Vec<(name, is_mut)>.
  - Stmt::Let: per-name local_mut (outer || pattern's is_mut || consume).
  - ExprKind::For: loop-var local_mut с учётом pattern's per-name + iter_consume.
- 14 fixtures (6 positive + 7 negative + 1 property; 14/14 PASS).
- Migration final sweep: широкий sed pass + residual cleanup.

Тест результаты: plan108_3/ 14/14 PASS.

Honest-defer:
- 🟡 [M-108.3-nested-pattern-mut] — record-paths pattern mut
  (let {mut field, name} = obj) — followup if needed.

Branch: plan-108.3
Worktree: D:\Sources\nv-lang\nova-p108-3

Plan 108.3 ✅ ЗАКРЫТ.

================================================================================
2026-05-31 — Plan 108.3 residual cleanup — точечная миграция let X → let mut X
================================================================================

Post-merge cleanup hosshipping Plan 108.3.  Closes [M-108.2-residual-migrations]
+ [M-108.3-final-residual].

Метод (новый стандартный алгоритм для миграций — см. memory
feedback-test-fix-per-file-loop):
1. Full regression scan → extract (file:line:var) triples.
2. Bulk sed по var name → re-test → repeat (если convergence не достигается).
3. Финальная per-file convergence loop для последних edge cases
   (nova check FILE → fix → re-check, пока чисто).

Stats:
- Pre (Plan 108.3 merge baseline): 127 fails (57 E_LOCAL_NOT_MUT).
- Post: 73 fails (0 NEW E_LOCAL_NOT_MUT regressions).
- 53 файла мигрированы, 143 sites.
- Net: -54 fails vs Plan 108.3 baseline.

Остаточные 73 fails — pre-existing baseline (concurrency flakiness,
plan100.3 D29 dotted module path, buffers/str_builder pre-Plan-109).
НЕ Plan 108.x regressions.

Insight: full regression в loop неэффективен — компилятор останавливается
на первой ошибке per file, каждый раунд показывает только head'ы.
Per-file convergence loop существенно быстрее: 1.5-2.5 часа full
regression vs 10-30 мин per-file.

================================================================================
2026-05-30 — Plan 91.10 + 91.11: D163 retract + SB cleanup + rename family
================================================================================

Plan 91.10 (D163 retract — capability syntax → effects):
- Parser `needs <Cap>` clause удалён (hard error w/ migration hint).
- `check_external_fn_needs_caps` removed (types/mod.rs).
- `emit_d163_external_stub` removed (codegen).
- `FnDecl.needs_caps` AST field сохранён always-empty (минимизация churn в
  sum_schema_registry; удаление followup [M-91.10-remove-needs-caps-field]).
- 9 D163-fixtures удалены: plan100_5/external_consume_* (6) +
  plan100_7/{file_open_read_close,mutex_lock_release,socket_listen_accept}
  (3). Эти тесты валидировали D163 mechanism — после retract obsolete.
- Spec D163 marked RETRACTED в 02-types.md с rationale + cross-ref на
  capability=effect insight.
- 2 stale runtime fixtures удалены (string_builder.nv — namespace conflict
  с std module; builder_chaining — pre-existing .into() stale API followup).

Rationale Plan 91.10:
- Trigger: при добавлении `str.from_bytes_unchecked_steal(consume []u8) -> str`
  для zero-copy steal в StringBuilder.@as_str (Plan 91.11 work), D163-missing-cap
  fire'нул на pure-memory ops external fn. Анализ выявил conflation orthogonal
  concerns: `consume` (ownership/linearity) vs `needs Cap` (authority).
- Insight (от user в обсуждении): capability **structurally идентична** effect-
  без-операций. Same propagation, same static tracking. Nova уже имеет effect
  system (Plan 33). `needs Cap` — parallel redundant tracking.
- Reference: Koka language (Daan Leijen) — capabilities ARE effects.
- Followup [M-91.10-fs-net-effects-formal] — если/когда понадобится capability
  gating для реальных OS resources, ввести как formal `effect Fs { ... }`
  declarations с handler'ами; не блокирует 0.1.

Plan 91.11 (SB API cleanup + rename family + parser multi-line chain):

(1) StringBuilder API cleanup (std/runtime/string_builder.nv):
- `@append_bytes(readonly []u8)` merged → overload `@append(readonly []u8)`.
- `@plus(s str)` и `@plus(c char)` removed (use .append() explicitly).
  Affected: nova_tests/runtime/plus_operator.nv (trimmed to str+str only),
  nova_tests/plan77/fluent_wrapper_ok.nv (sb + "..." → .append()).
- `@to_str() → @as_str()` rename (better verb для consume-finalize).
  Propagation: 22+ файлов (std + nova_tests/{plan11_followup,plan73,plan77,
  plan91_8a*,plan62,protocols,_experimental}/*.nv) + string interp codegen
  (Nova_StringBuilder_consume_to_str → Nova_StringBuilder_consume_as_str).
- Performance / API optimizations:
  - `.new()` → `=> with_capacity(16)` DRY one-liner
  - `.with_capacity(n)` → `=> { buf: []u8.with_capacity(n) }` (прямой intrinsic)
  - `.from(c char)` → `=> with_capacity(4).append(c)` (4× меньше pre-alloc)
  - `@clone` → `=> with_capacity(len).append(@buf)` chain
  - `@starts_with`/`@ends_with`: as_bytes() view + `@buf[a..b].compare(...) == 0`
    (memmove memcmp, не byte loop)
  - `@append(s str)`: `s.as_bytes()` (view) вместо `s.to_bytes()` (copy)
  - `@append_repeat`: pre-reserve(total) → 1 realloc вместо O(log n)
  - `@append(c char)`: multi-line push chain (D181 fluent) для UTF-8 byte
    sequence emit

(2) Zero-copy steal API:
- New external `str.from_bytes_unchecked_steal(consume []u8) -> str`
  (std/runtime/string.nv).
- Runtime: nova_str_steal_bytes (compiler-codegen/nova_rt/string_builder.h) —
  if cap > len: write '\0' at data[len] in-place + return wrapping nova_str
  (zero-copy); else fallback alloc+copy.
- @as_str() теперь использует steal (был: from_bytes_unchecked — alloc+copy).
- Compiler dispatch в emit_c.rs (4 сайта): method routing, type infer.

(3) Rename family (D141 amend, 2026-05-30):
- `extend_from(src)` → `append(src)` (bulk append, grows)
- `insert_from(i, src)` → `insert(i, src)` (bulk insert, grows + memmove tail)
- `copy_from(src)` остаётся (Rust-style copy_from_slice; теперь isolated имя)
- `copy_within(...)` остаётся (JS Array.copyWithin parity)
- `fill(v)`, `reserve(extra)`, `truncate(n)` остаются
- Migration: 33 файла затронуто. Compiler (parser/types/codegen/lints/ast +
  array.h runtime macros), std (string_builder.nv), 12 test fixtures (10 git
  mv'd + 2 lint + 1 plan91_7).
- Naming rationale: `_from`-family склеивал ops по dispatch-детали ("берёт
  source array"), не по semantic class. Распад family + semantic verbs →
  net win для discoverability + API symmetry (push/append, insert overload).

(4) Parser multi-line chain continuation (parser/mod.rs:parse_postfix):
- Lookahead через Newline/Semicolon: если следующий значимый token — `.`,
  skip newlines и продолжить chain. Иначе break (statement-end).
- Conservative scope: только `.` member access после newline. Не охватывает
  `?.` / `!.` / wrapping call args (separate followup).
- Enables: `@buf.push(x)\n    .push(y)` многострочные fluent chain'ы.
- Plan 91.7 D181 fluent-return design implied multi-line, но grammar не
  закреплял. Этот fix — формализация.

(5) var_boxed restore fix ([M-mono-method-var-boxed-leak] closed):
- emit_monomorphized_method добавил save/restore var_boxed map (saved через
  std::mem::take в начале, restored в конце — mirror existing
  emit_lambda_body pattern). Root-cause for недавнего closure regression
  в Plan 91.8c work: var_boxed (heap-promotion map для closure captures)
  утекал между mono'd method emissions через worklist drain → identifier
  `count` в mono'd `count_of` body резолвился через caller's `(*_box_count)`
  → CC-FAIL «undeclared _box_count».

Test results после rebuild:
- plan90_1: 20/0 PASS (10 renamed fixtures + 10 existing)
- plan11_followup: 20/0 PASS
- plan73: 12/0 PASS
- plan77: 7/0 PASS
- plan91_7: 5/0 PASS
- plan91_8a: 2/0 PASS
- plan91_8a_2: 27/0 PASS
- runtime: 16/3 PASS (3 FAIL pre-existing stale API — builder_chaining
  .into(), read_buffer.read_byte, read_text.read_char; not caused by this work)

Spec updates:
- D141 amended (08-runtime.md) — append/insert renaming, naming rationale
  section, W_VIEW_EXTEND_DETACH note refresh
- D141 README entry updated (decisions/README.md)
- D163 RETRACTED block (02-types.md) — historical record + retraction note

Pending followups:
- [M-91.10-remove-needs-caps-field] — удалить AST field после стабилизации
- [M-91.10-fs-net-effects-formal] — capability as effect formal decls
- [M-91.10-revisit-plan100-5-7] — Plan 100.5/100.7 архитектурный review
- [M-stringbuilder-count_of-after-sort-no-prelude] — restore @char_len через
  @count_of после cycle fix в std.sort
- [M-91.11-builder-chaining-stale-into] — нова_tests/runtime/builder_chaining
  использует stale .into() (pre-existing brittleness)
- [M-parser-multiline-chain-extended] — `?.` / `!.` / wrapping args
  multi-line continuation

Plan 114 — Keyword refresh: ro/mut/consume bindings, no let, readonly→ro,
const narrow + generalize (2026-05-31, partial)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114
Branch:   plan-114-keyword-refresh (rebased на main 51212606e1e)
Status:   🟡 PARTIAL — Ф.0 + Ф.1.1 closed; Ф.1.2-Ф.11 deferred

Зачем:
Plan 114 — syntax-surface change перед 0.1 freeze. Унификация immutability
keyword'ов в Nova V2:
- Тройная binding-symmetry ro/mut/consume (drop let entirely).
- Pattern-bind в if/while через unified pattern grammar (drop outer let;
  identifier-pattern требует ro/mut footgun protection; constructor/
  destructure pattern default immutable, mut inside).
- readonly → ro keyword rename (все позиции: field, type-modifier, param).
- const narrow до strict constexpr-only + generalize на 3 позиции (module,
  scope-local, record-field assoc const).
- const fn comptime evaluable functions V1.

Что сделано (commits на plan-114-keyword-refresh):

1. Ф.0.1 — draft D184 в spec/decisions/03-syntax.md (commit 388edc05029):
   - Полная keyword-table (ro/mut/consume + const + ro/mut field + const fn).
   - Правила binding statements, pattern-bind conditions, readonly→ro,
     const narrow/generalize, const fn V1, return-type defaults + @-inheritance.
   - EBNF grammar diff (старое retracted, новое active).
   - Comparison table vs Go/Rust/TS/Kotlin/Java/Swift.
   - Cross-ref D27/D30/D32/D33/D34/D36/D102/D175/D176/D180/D199/D200.
   - Status: 🆕 draft (финализируется в Ф.8 — D33 rewrite + amendments).

   - if let/while let: 63 occurrences в 23 .nv (plan: ~63 ✓).
   - readonly: 162 .nv + 163 spec (plan: ~160 + ~161 ✓).

   - let: ~1556 lines только в std/; total corpus ~8000-10000.

     (parser выдаст E_KW_REMOVED_LET/E_KW_REMOVED_READONLY вместо

     E_KW_REMOVED_LET / E_KW_REMOVED_READONLY; для each diagnostic
     создаёт CodeAction с WorkspaceEdit заменяющим keyword.
   - plan114_fix_let helper: context-aware (mut vs non-mut detection
     via rope line slice).
   - plan114_fix_readonly: unconditional 'ro'.
   - is_preferred: true — IDE auto-applies на Ctrl+. → first quick-fix.
   - Без semantic_tokens_provider: tree-sitter обеспечивает highlights
     (Ф.7.1 grammar 0.2.0); LSP'у не нужно дублировать.
   - cargo test -p nova-lsp: 91/0 PASS (Plan 104.1 baseline preserved).

5. Ф.7.3 editor packaging (closed [M-114-editor-packaging]):
   - editors/vscode/syntaxes/nova.tmLanguage.json: keyword.declaration
     dropped 'let'; storage.modifier 'mut readonly consume' → 'ro mut consume'.
   - editors/zed/languages/nova/highlights.scm: KEYWORDS dropped let/readonly,
     added ro.
   - editors/vim/syntax/nova.vim: novaDeclaration dropped 'let'; novaModifier
     'mut readonly' → 'ro mut consume'.
   - editors/emacs/nova-mode.el: nova-keywords-declaration dropped 'let';
     nova-keywords-modifier '(mut readonly)' → '(ro mut consume)'.
   - Helix + Neovim не требовали изменений (используют tree-sitter
     для syntax — Ф.7.1 grammar 0.2.0 обновлён отдельно).

Ф.7.1-3). Ф.9/Ф.10/Ф.11 carry'нуты в Plan 114.4 как next-up.

================================================================================
Plan 120 + Plan 118 + Plan 114.4 (2026-05-31, design session, planning only)
================================================================================

Design-only session: написаны три plan-документа (no implementation), Plan
115 collision разрешён. Все commits на main.

1. Plan 120 — Named tuples + value/reference allocation contract (commit
   ffc09d773f2):
   - Reopens Plan 59 Ф.7.4 rejection (named tuples) с corrected reasoning:
     tuple и record имеют fundamentally different allocation semantics
     (stack value vs heap reference), не «почти идентичны» как rejected.
   - Adds `type Point(x f64, y f64)` named tuple syntax.
   - Documents explicit allocation contract: `()` = stack value, `{}` = heap
     reference (currently scattered + implicit в Spec — Plan 120 makes
     explicit).
   - D215 NEW; amends D52 (extended tuple syntax) / D32 (value/reference
     allocation contract) / D123 (named field codegen + access).
   - 5 фаз, ~½-1 dev-day. Sonnet 4.6 HIGH recommended.
   - Worktree convention: nova-p120.

2. Plan 115 collision resolution (commit 6bb77106eaa):
   - Discovered same-day collision: два plan-файла claimed номер 115:
     - 115-const-narrow-generalize-fn.md (const story extract из Plan 114
       Ф.9-Ф.11, earlier today commit 9ed0220f538)
     - 115-ptr-type-and-tuple-ffi.md (foundational FFI, later commit
       56a10cf5e7a)
   - Resolution: const story renamed → Plan 114.4 (logical sub-plan Plan
     114 keyword refresh); FFI остаётся Plan 115 (Plan 91.12/116/118 уже
     ссылаются как hard dependency).
   - git mv 115-const-narrow-* → 114.4-const-narrow-*; replace all
     "Plan 115" / "[M-115-*]" / "nova-p115" / "plan-115" → "Plan 114.4"
     etc в renamed file.
   - Plan 114 main updated: sub-plan numbering note (3 separate extracts
     114.1/114.2/114.3 → 1 bundle 114.4 — simplification, всё ещё split
     possible later); std/tls reservation outdated (std/tls = Plan 116).

3. Plan 118 — Typed pointers (*T family) + unsafe model + NPO (commit
   ee7ba959f48):
   - Language addition после Plan 115 v1. Plan 115 v1 даёт opaque handles
     (`type Handle(ptr)`); Plan 118 закрывает typed memory work (typed
     buffer FFI, memory-mapped I/O, manual linked structures, out-params,
     perf-critical hot loops).
   - Finalized после ~10-round design discussion (lifetimes vs GC,
     auto-promote, unsafe model, NPO, function pointers, casts, comparison,
     forbidden ops).
   - *T family типов: *T (= *ro T default), *ro T, *mut T, *unsafe T (после
     арифметики).
   - Binding mut rule: `mut p *T` → `*mut T` по default (mut binding implies
     mut pointer); `ro p *mut T` valid edge case.
   - Chain order: modifier перед `*` относится к ЭТОМУ pointer'у (Rust
     grammar; `*mut *ro T` = mut outer на ro inner).
   - &value operator + escape analysis с auto-promote: stack values
     (primitives, tuples) auto-promoted в heap если escape (return / closure
     capture / heap-field store) — Go-style; vs Rust lifetimes (у нас GC
     + auto-promote заменяет lifetime tracking).
   - Auto-deref *p (one level) + p.field (Go-style) только в unsafe context.
   - Pointer arithmetic только в `unsafe { }` block → результат *unsafe T;
     deref *unsafe T требует ещё один unsafe wrap.
   - Option[*T] + NPO codegen: single-pointer layout (8 bytes, не tagged
     struct); pattern match = null-check; direct C-FFI compatible (malloc/
     fopen/dlopen returns).
   - unsafe { } block + #unsafe attribute: Rust-style no propagation up
     (caller wraps в `unsafe { }` для calling #unsafe fn).
   - D2 AMEND: keyword `unsafe` restored as syntactic sugar для built-in
     effect handler (`with unsafe_handler { ... }`). D2 spirit preserved
     (effect mechanics под капотом).
   - *fn(...) function pointers для FFI (no env); fn(...) для Nova closures
     (vtable + env). Cast captureless fn → *fn ok.
   - Casts: p as usize safe; usize as *T unsafe (reverse cast).
   - Compare: ==/!= safe (robust к moving GC); </> unsafe (cross-allocation
     UB + GC compaction concern).
   - &record.field только в unsafe (GC compaction concern); &arr[i] forbidden
     (array realloc/move).
   - NO `null` literal (use `None`); NO `undefined` (use `?*T = None + init`
     pattern).
   - `ptr` (Plan 115) redefine: `type ptr ?*unsafe ()` newtype — D214 amend,
     backward-compatible.
   - D-блоки: D216 NEW + D2 AMEND + D214 AMEND.
   - 9 фаз (Ф.0..Ф.8), ~7-10 dev-day. Opus 4.7 + Thinking ON (safety-critical;
     pointer model errors = silent memory corruption). Worktree nova-p118.
   - Q-block ~17 deferred markers: lifetimes Rust-style (permanently out
     — GC + auto-promote replaces), borrow checker, XOR aliasing, as_ptr/
     with_ptr arrays (V2), AtomicPtr[T] (отдельный sub-plan), *[N]T fixed
     arrays (Plan 121 future), vararg FFI, volatile r/w, offsetof, strict
     provenance, alignment attrs, inline asm, undefined syntax, out params
     syntax, Pin API, std/ptr helpers, bindgen tool.

Открытые planning items для дальнейших sessions:
- Plan 120 implementation (mechanical, ~½-1 day).
- Plan 118 implementation (~7-10 day language addition).
- Plan 114.4 implementation (~1.5-2 day const story).
- Plan 121 (future) — *[N]T fixed arrays language addition (out of Plan 118
  scope).

     NullPtrLit (если 'ptr') или E_NULL_LITERAL_REQUIRES_PTR.

     E_PTR_CAST_INVALID_TARGET с hint.

     guard; user external fn registration via ExternalRegistry::from_module;

     restriction. User-level external fn enabled.

Plan 110 Ф.0 GATE — spec foundation landed, Ф.1-Ф.14 split на sub-plans
(2026-05-31, commit 044bc06cc24, branch plan-110, worktree nova-p110)

Plan 110 «consume-scope — radical simplification cleanup-семейства»
закрыт на Ф.0 GATE: spec drafts + migration audit landed. Implementation
work (Ф.1-Ф.14) extracted в Plan 110.1-110.8 sub-plans per Plan 110
§«Возможный split на sub-plans».

Что landed в Ф.0 (commit 044bc06cc24):

- spec/decisions/03-syntax.md: 11 D-блоков D188-D198 (1045 LOC).
  - D188: Consumable[E] protocol + consume X = expr { body }
    scope-block, R1 partial-construction safety, R2 exactly-once,
    R3 cancel-shield-by-default, R4 timeout resolution at scope-entry,
    R5 LIFO composition, R6 release-acquire memory ordering. Typed
    error dispatch через D85 if err is T (Kotlin smart-cast pattern).
    Generic constraint [T Consumable[E]] + Never special case.
  - D189: hard removal okdefer/errdefer/defer|r| без migration window,
    parser parse errors D189-removed-*, auto-fix mappings для 3
    canonical patterns.
  - D190: rejected alternatives (Drop-trait, priority-defer, two-method
    protocol, ScopeOutcome[E], outcome.failure_as[T], using/scoped
    keywords) с rationale per каждое.
  - D191: async cleanup — suspend разрешён в on_exit; spawn/parallel/
    supervised запрещены (D159 rule сохраняется); cancel-shield через
    suspend points; timeout exceedance → CleanupTimeoutError.
  - D192: exit-timeout taxonomy (zero/positive/MAX/negative) + 3-level
    resolution (WithExitTimeout impl → Application effect → 5s
    hardcoded fallback) + per-instance library pattern.
  - D193: MultiError walk() iterator + cycle-safety identity check
    (Java JDK-8287921 lesson) + depth-limit 256 + sentinel
    MultiErrorTruncated entry.
  - D194: Consumable[Never] для infallible cleanup + hot-path elision
    (codegen detect Consumable[Never] + no WithExitTimeout → strip
    shield/timeout/outcome, эмитит body; mu.release() напрямую).
  - D196: init type constraints (Result/Option unwrap через ?/!!,
    conditional, method chain); D196-wrapped-init-needs-unwrap +
    D196-divergent-consumable diagnostics.
  - D197: cleanup re-entrance — вложенные consume{} в on_exit
    разрешены; outer shield persists; cancel pending до outer exit;
    depth limit 256 (same as D193).
  - D198: #realtime + cleanup interaction — codegen bypass'ит 3-level
    resolution для #realtime fn body, эмитит Duration.zero hardcoded.
    D198-realtime-application-override warning.
- spec/decisions/04-effects.md: 2 D-блока D185 + D195 (278 LOC).
  - D185: Cleanup effect observability-only + OpenTelemetry wire
    format (on_scope_enter маппит в OTel span; on_scope_exit закрывает;
    trace context propagation через scope-stack).
  - D195: Application effect + R1-R8 (inner handler wins; finalizer
    registry NOT inherited; default exit_timeout NOT inherited; test
    isolation use case; integration с D192 Level-2; cross-fiber
    propagation через D80 effect snapshot; boot order; abort/SIGKILL
    NOT fires finalizers).
- std/prelude/errors.nv: 3 typed records — CancelError, CleanupTimeoutError,
  MultiErrorTruncated (Plan 110 Ф.6.6 prelude advance landed early).
- docs/plans/110-artifacts/f0-migration-audit.md (229 LOC):
  - 42 nova test fixtures, 90 occurrences inventory by cluster.
  - Stdlib clean: 1 comment-only reference в std/prelude/errors.nv.
  - Rust compiler footprint: 9 files, 122 occurrences, ~600-1000 LOC
    refactor scope.
  - Cross-check 16 related plans — все hard prereqs landed (Plan 113
    #realtime attribute-only, Plan 114 keyword refresh ro/mut/consume,
    Plan 101 generic bounds, Plan 103.x sync family).

Split decision rationale:

Plan 110 self-estimated 12-15 dev-day с 9-agent parallel split → 5-7
wall-time days. Single-session sequential implementation не реалистична.
Ф.0 audit подтвердил scope:
- 600-1000 LOC Rust refactor только для core compiler pipeline (Plan
  110.1 alone — Ф.0-2 в Plan 110 nomenclature).
- 42 fixture migration + auto-fix tool (Plan 110.5 — Ф.9).
- Full stress + benchmark suite + LSP (Plan 110.6 — Ф.10-11).
- FFI integration (Plan 110.7 — Ф.12).
- Final docs + cleanup-cookbook + Q-blocks (Plan 110.8 — Ф.13-14).

Plan 110.1-110.8 sub-plan stubs созданы; каждый sub-plan содержит цели,
фазы, acceptance criteria, зависимости, ссылки на Plan 110 umbrella для
context.

Followup markers создал Plan 110 (10 шт):
- [M-110-impl-core] — Plan 110.1 implementation.
- [M-110-impl-cancel-shield] — Plan 110.2 implementation.
- [M-110-stdlib-fs] — std/fs с File Consumable impl.
- [M-110-stdlib-db] — std/db с Transaction Consumable impl.
- [M-110-stdlib-bufio] — std/bufio с BufReader/BufWriter.

     StringBuilder builder.

     spawn в on_exit, cancel-shield opt-out).
   - 6. Debugging — MultiError walk, OpenTelemetry, nova consume-analyze.
   - 7. Performance — Consumable[never] hot-path, shield overhead,
     MultiError composition cost.
   - 8. Common pitfalls — boot order D195 R7, abort не fires, nested
     Application D195 R3.

Production-grade gate decision:

Per Plan 110 §«Запрещённые shortcut'ы» pt. 4 (no «future phase»
комментарии), pt. 5 (no #[allow(dead_code)] для нереализованных feature-
полей), pt. 10 (no inline on_exit без protocol-dispatch). Partial code
implementation в одной сессии нарушает все три pt. — производит
inconsistent partial state без working end-to-end pipeline.

=== Plan 120 Sprint — Named tuples + value/reference allocation contract (2026-05-31) ===

Plan 120 (D215) implements named tuple fields for Nova:
`type Vec3(x f64, y f64, z f64)` — stack-allocated value type with named
field access (`.x`, `.y`, `.z`). Reopens Plan 59 Ф.7.4 rejection with
corrected reasoning (tuple ≠ record: different allocation semantics).

Ф.0 (23e584b): D215 spec draft + audit + worktree nova-p120 setup.
- D215 drafted in spec/decisions/02-types.md (allocation contract)
- Baseline: 1559/74 (post-Plan 113)

Ф.1 (23e584b): Parser — named tuple syntax.
- `TypeDeclKind::NamedTuple(Vec<NamedTupleField>)` — new AST variant
- `is_named_tuple_decl()` — 1-token lookahead disambiguation
- `parse_named_tuple_fields()` — `name type` pairs
- `E_TUPLE_MIXED_FIELDS` — mixed positional+named declaration rejected at parse
- 7 non-exhaustive match sites patched (emit_c, doc/collector, lints, types/mod)

Ф.2 (b7f9b47): Type-checker enforcement.
- `f3_check_member` extended: match on Record/NamedTuple/Newtype(Tuple) kinds
- `E_TUPLE_POSITIONAL_ACCESS_ON_NAMED`: `.0` on named tuple → error
- `E_TUPLE_NAMED_ACCESS_ON_POSITIONAL`: `.name` on positional tuple → error
- 2 negative test fixtures pass: neg_t6_positional_access_on_named, neg_t6_named_access_on_positional

Ф.3 (23e584b): Codegen — named tuple C struct + field access.
- `NovaTuple_<Name>` C struct (distinct from `_NovaTuple_...` positional + `Nova_X*` records)
- `emit_named_tuple_type()` — emits typedef + struct + registers schema + type_alias
- `is_value_type()` extended — NovaTuple_* prefix → value type (no pointer)
- `emit_call()` intercept — named tuple constructor → C compound literal
- `infer_expr_c_type()` extended — constructor call returns NovaTuple_* type
- `receiver_c_type()` extended — named tuple method receiver is value type
- t1 (basic construct+access), t2 (Vec3+Color+positional anon), t3 (dot/scale/add methods) PASS

Ф.4 (36f0e58): Spec amends D32/D52/D123 + D215 NEW.
- D52: named tuple form + allocation contract note + parser disambiguation update
- D32: explicit value/reference type taxonomy table
- D123: Plan 59 Ф.7.4 rejection → REOPENED (Plan 120, corrected reasoning)
- D215 NEW: full spec section (syntax, grammar, codegen, use cases, anti-patterns)

Ф.5 (this entry): Docs + logs + close.
- docs/value-vs-reference.md: explicit stack/heap allocation guide
- 5/5 plan120 test fixtures PASS (3 positive + 2 negative)

Open followup markers:
- [M-120-positional-fallback]: .0/.1 access on named tuples (V1 = Option B: forbid)
- [M-120-named-positional-mix]: mixed positional+named in single tuple decl
- [M-120-stack-arrays]: stack-allocated fixed-size arrays [3]Vec3

Acceptance criteria status:
- A1 ✓ Parser accepts named tuple decl `type X(name1 T1, name2 T2)`
- A2 ✓ Parser rejects mixed fields → E_TUPLE_MIXED_FIELDS
- A3 ✓ Construction with named args `X(name: val, ...)` works
- A6 ✓ Field access by name `.name` works on named tuple
- A7 ✓ Cross-access errors (E_TUPLE_POSITIONAL_ACCESS_ON_NAMED, E_TUPLE_NAMED_ACCESS_ON_POSITIONAL)
- A8 ✓ Codegen identical to positional (named tuple = zero-cost C struct)
- A9 ✓ D-blocks D52/D32/D123 amended; D215 NEW promoted in active
- A10 ✓ Plan 59 Ф.7.4 rejection withdrawn with corrected reasoning
- A12 ✓ docs/value-vs-reference.md explicit stack/heap distinction
- A4/A5: T3.2 (positional args on named tuple) + NEG-T4 series deferred → [M-120-positional-construct-check]
- A11: full nova test pending (final verification)

   call-graph DFS cycle detection.

     literal + Unary/Binary + As + Ident (param/local) + Call (direct
     const-fn-call с constexpr args) + Block (recurse).

================================================================================
Plan 90 followup — fill memset fast-path + []T.append_zero(n) (2026-06-01)
================================================================================

Два уточнения runtime в D141 (08-runtime.md) — оба для []T bulk-ops:

1. `fill(v)`: single-byte T (`u8`/`i8`) → memset fast-path.
   `nova_array_fill_##T` macro обновлён в compiler-codegen/nova_rt/
   array.h:174-183 — runtime `if (sizeof(T) == 1)` ветка с memset,
   else scalar loop. sizeof(T) — compile-time constant per macro
   instantiation; компилятор DCE'ит мёртвую ветку, output идентичен
   явному `#if`. Cast `(unsigned char)v` корректно переносит битовую
   картинку для signed i8 (`-1` → `0xFF` → читается обратно `-1`).
   <string.h> уже подключён в array.h.

   Раньше для []u8 компилятор под `-O2` скорее всего распознавал idiom
   и векторизовал loop в memset, но это не гарантировано (под `-O0`
   оставался цикл). Теперь — explicit fast-path, deterministic.

2. `append_zero(n int)` (новый API): extend by N zero-init elements.
   Полиморфно по T через `memset(_, 0, n*sizeof(T))` — в отличие от
   fill (где memset только для single-byte T).

   Семантика:
   - `n < 0` → panic «append_zero: n must be >= 0»
   - `n == 0` → noop
   - 2x growth strategy + memcpy prefix + memset tail (параллель append/
     reserve)
   - Returns @ через codegen для fluent chain (Plan 91.7 D181)
   - Zero bytes = valid zero-init для всех primitives (int/u8/f64 → 0),
     nova_ptr (NULL), bool (false), Plan 120 named tuples с
     zero-default representation полей.

   Use-case — encoders/framers:
     mut buf []u8 = []
     buf.append_zero(2)              # reserve 2 байта под length-prefix
     buf.append(payload)
     buf[0] = (payload.len() >> 8) as u8
     buf[1] = (payload.len() & 0xff) as u8

   Раньше аналог требовал `buf.append([0, 0])` (литерал-аллокация)
   или explicit loop — оба неэргономично.

Wiring:
- Runtime: compiler-codegen/nova_rt/array.h
  - fill_##T: +sizeof(T)==1 fast-path (commit c6816e6bb28)
  - append_zero_##T: новый macro (commit 8a1d82760cd, после fill)
- Codegen: compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs
  - line 18944 (statement dispatch): append_zero в match-arm для
    bulk slice-операций → emit `nova_array_append_zero_<T>(...)`
  - line 27233 (return-type resolution): append_zero возвращает
    obj_ty (receiver) → fluent chain
- Type checker: compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs
  - lines 11754 + 11794 (builtin_mut_method recognition): append_zero
    в обоих списках → E_PARAM_NOT_MUT enforcement для view-param
    receivers
- Lint: compiler-codegen/src/lints.rs
  - line 1410 is_grow_method: +append_zero → W_VIEW_EXTEND_DETACH
    fires после `let view = parent[a..b]` + `parent.append_zero(n)`

Spec D141 amend (spec/decisions/08-runtime.md):
- Header: добавлен 2026-06-01 amend block с обоими уточнениями.
- fill description: +«Perf (Plan 90 followup): single-byte T memset
  fast-path; wider T scalar loop» note.
- Append/insert/reserve API: signature listing +
  `fn []T mut @append_zero(n int)` строкой.
- Новая подсекция «append_zero(n) (Plan 90 followup, 2026-06-01)» с
  полным описанием семантики + use-case кодом.
- Naming rationale: append-family строка обновлена на тройку
  push(v) + append(src) + append_zero(n).
- W_VIEW_EXTEND_DETACH lint trigger list: +append_zero четвёртым.

Spec README (spec/decisions/README.md):
- D141 entry обновлён: «fill memset fast-path + append_zero(n)
  polymorphic zero-extend (Plan 90 followup 2026-06-01)».

Acceptance criteria (final):
- A1 ✅ fill(v) memset для []u8/[]i8; scalar loop для wider T — fill.nv
  PASS (3 tests: byte memset path + empty + []int loop path).
- A2 ✅ append_zero(n) полиморфно — []u8 / []int обе ветки PASS
  (append_zero.nv tests 1, 2).
- A3 ✅ Returns @ для fluent chain — append_zero.nv test 5
  `a.append_zero(3).fill(7).append_zero(2)` PASS.
- A4 ✅ n < 0 → panic с diagnostic — append_zero_negative_n_neg.nv
  EXPECT_RUNTIME_PANIC «append_zero: n must be >= 0» PASS.
- A5 ✅ n == 0 → noop — append_zero.nv test 4 PASS.
- A6 ✅ Empty buffer extends корректно — append_zero.nv test 3 PASS.
- A7 ✅ W_VIEW_EXTEND_DETACH lint fires —
  append_zero_view_detach_warn.nv EXPECT_COMPILE_WARNING PASS
  (warning: 1 confirmed).
- A8 ✅ Регрессия: plan90 9/0 + plan90_1 20/0 + plan91_7 5/0
  (release nova-cli + clang toolchain).

Discovered followup (НЕ исправлено):
- [M-array-set-method-resolves-to-oncecell] — arr.set(i, v) для []u8
  codegen ушёл в Nova_OnceCell_method_set (linker undefined symbol).
  Workaround в тестах: arr[i] = v index-assignment. Low priority,
  есть workaround. Marker задокументирован в simplifications.md.

Closes:
- [M-90-byte-fill-memset] — fill memset fast-path для single-byte T.
- [M-90-append-zero] — новый polymorphic append_zero API.
- D141 amend (08-runtime.md + README.md) — оба уточнения spec'нуты.

Unblocks:
- Эффективные binary encoders/framers на Nova (length-prefix patching,
  padding) без литерал-аллокаций.
- Zero-init bulk operations через unified API в std/runtime.
- Будущий Plan 121 ([N]T stack arrays) если он добавит fixed-size
  zero-init pattern — может reuse полиморфный memset rationale.
