================================================================================
Plan 83.11 §12.31 — [M-83.11-supervised-spawn-cancel-memcpy-segv] CLOSED (2026-06-01)
================================================================================

Followup в Plan 83.11 (Centralized I/O driver). Session #13.
Worktree: nova-p83-11, branch plan-83.11-centralized-driver.

Background: после §12.27-29 bisect определил `dd7a4f00bc5` как culprit;
§12.30 подготовил cdb_session.sh wrapper, но cdb.exe на машине не было
(требуется Windows SDK + admin elevation для winget install). Прошлые
7 attempts (§12.13-26) потратили ~10h на hypothesis-driven fixes без
crash localization.

§12.31 — root cause найден ЗА ОДИН СЕАНС (~30 min) через pivot:
вместо cdb — собственный in-process Vectored Exception Handler через
Windows-native `dbghelp.dll` (SymInitialize + StackWalk64 + SymFromAddr
+ SymGetLineFromAddr64). dbghelp.lib уже линкуется в test_runner.rs,
поэтому wiring был trivial.

Tool: `compiler-codegen/nova_rt/segv_diag.c` (~165 LOC).
- Hook в `nova_gc_init` (gated by NOVA_DIAG_SEGV=1 env)
- Zero overhead when unset; no-op TU на не-Windows
- AddVectoredExceptionHandler с first-handler priority
- На AV: dumps registers (RAX-R15+RIP+RSP+RBP), exception code,
  fault address + operation (READ/WRITE), exe base + RIP-RVA,
  до 50 frames stack с module!symbol+offset (file:line where PDB has)
- ExitProcess(3) для prevention рекурсии
- Reusable Windows debugging tool для любых future races

Tool wire-up:
- alloc_boehm.c — добавлен extern call к _nova_install_segv_handler()
  первой строкой в nova_gc_init
- test_runner.rs — добавлен rt_segv_diag во все три toolchain branches
  (clang/msvc/gcc)

Root cause (frame[1] revealed):
- Frame[0]: nova_aint_cas+0x2F (sync.h:169 — lock cmpxchg)
- Frame[1]: _nova_driver_handle_cancel_scope+0x61 (driver.c:312) ← KEYSTONE
  CAS на &st->stage где st = scope->armed_sleeps_head
- Frame[2+]: process_job → drain_jobs → job_async_cb → uv_run → driver_main

CSD probe (одна fprintf at function entry — point-probe, не Heisen-test)
показал scope fields = garbage:
  scope=stack_addr (valid)
  bound_token=NULL (should be tok)
  head=0x7FF6358864C9 (.rdata — wild)
  count=372/580/537 (garbage)
  slot_lock=large negative (garbage)

Это use-after-free stack-allocated NovaFiberQueue.

Causal timeline:
1. main: nova_scope_init(&_nova_scope_q_0) — стек инициализирован
2. main: spawn child + bind tok + nova_supervised_run_cancel
3. child: tok.cancel() → _nova_cancel_via_driver(bound_scope) →
   malloc job{kind=CANCEL_SCOPE, scope=&_nova_scope_q_0} + submit_job +
   uv_async_send(driver)
4. child: fiber body completes, epilogue decrements pending_remote
5. main: pending_remote == 0 → exits loop → drop_state + unbind + return
6. main: test function returns → _nova_scope_q_0 stack frame reused
7. driver thread: wakes на job_async_cb → process_job(stale ptr) →
   scope->armed_sleeps_head reads garbage → wild ptr in .rdata
8. driver: `lock cmpxchg dword [.rdata+0x579], r8d` → SEGV

§12.9 «memcpy to .rdata» symptom был misdirection: x86 LOCK CMPXCHG
faults regardless of compare result (page-writability check на
LOCK cycle), и llvm-symbolizer без DIA resolved nova_aint_cas как
memcpy через misclassification.

Fix design — lifetime counter pattern (4 хирургических changes):

1. NovaFiberQueue gets `nova_atomic_int pending_driver_jobs` field
2. _nova_cancel_via_driver:
     nova_aint_inc(&scope->pending_driver_jobs)  // ACQ_REL
     if (nova_driver_submit_job(job) != 0) {
         free(job);
         __atomic_fetch_sub(&scope->pending_driver_jobs, 1, ACQ_REL);
     }
3. _nova_driver_handle_cancel_scope (end of function):
     __atomic_fetch_sub(&scope->pending_driver_jobs, 1, RELEASE)
4. nova_supervised_run_impl (before drop_state/unbind/return):
     while (nova_aint_load(&q->pending_driver_jobs) > 0) {
         uv_run(nova_current_loop(), UV_RUN_NOWAIT);
         if (nova_aint_load(...) > 0) uv_sleep(1);
     }

Memory ordering:
- ACQ_REL inc / RELEASE dec / ACQUIRE load формирует proper happens-before
- Counter > 0 → main holds stack frame alive
- Counter == 0 → driver dereferenced all scope fields → safe to return

Verification:
- _min.nv стресс: 1/30 → 30/30 PASS ✅
- cancel_semantics_test: 0/30 (§12.28) → 120/120 PASS ✅
- No deadlock с driver shutdown (atexit runs after main returns;
  main can only return after wait loop exits)

Acceptance criteria:
- A1 — root cause identified ✅ (frame[1] keystone)
- A2 — fix that addresses root cause ✅ (counter pattern)
- A3 — _min.nv 30/30 stress PASS ✅
- A4 — cancel_semantics_test 30/30 PASS ✅
- A5 — 0 new regressions (verified via stash-baseline: 481 pre-existing
  FAILs are Plan 73.1 V3 / Plan 91.12 / Plan 99 / Plan 110.x — unrelated)

stress_iso_3e baseline check: 0/10 PASS at HEAD без моего fix — already
broken (Plan 110.x merge artifact, cleanup-timeout-exceeded from
nv_shield_check_deadline). НЕ regressed моим fix.

Lessons learned (added к §10.4 / §12.16 — lessons #16-20):
16. «VEH + native SymFromAddr beats absent cdb on Windows». dbghelp.dll
    есть на каждой Windows install, dbghelp.lib линкуется уже. ~165 LOC
    + 1 hook = full symbolized stack. Намного дешевле admin elevation.
    Add to default diagnostic kit для future Windows-only races.
    llvm-symbolizer без DIA support бесполезен для PDB (returns ??:0:0).
17. «One diagnostic print > eight hypothesis attempts». §12.13-26
    потратили 7 attempts через hypothesize-fix-test (~10h). Эта сессия:
    install VEH (10 min code), repro captured frame[1] на FIRST run
    (1 min), one ad-hoc CSD probe revealed garbage scope (5 min),
    targeted fix (10 min). Total ~30 min. The 7 prior attempts could
    не sample the right hypothesis потому что iterated в the wrong
    region (GC scanning, fiber stack coverage, cancel-box-str ABI).
    Frame[1] told the answer immediately.
18. «Compound-literal "memcpy to .rdata" was misdirection в §12.9».
    The nova_cancel_box_str codegen pattern (nova_str){.ptr=...,.len=...}
    — stack temporary, red herring. The real crash was lock cmpxchg в
    nova_aint_cas looking like memcpy to llvm-symbolizer fallback.
    Don't trust llvm-symbolizer for PDB; use Windows-native APIs.
19. «Stack-allocated scope must outlive all async references». General
    invariant any time stack pointer crosses a thread/queue boundary.
    Plan 83.11 Ф.2 introduced driver thread + Ф.3 added CANCEL_SCOPE
    jobs carrying scope ptr — lifetime invariant был не audited тогда.
    Pattern для futures plans: any time a job contains a pointer to
    caller's local, caller must wait for job processing before return.
20. «Differentiate Heisen-tests vs point-probes». Heisen-tests = broad
    instrumentation that changes timing (anti-pattern per §10.4 #1).
    Point-probes = single fprintf at function entry in cold path,
    showing correctness of heap value (used in §12.31). Latter are
    valuable diagnostics, не anti-pattern.

Status: ✅ V1 CLOSED 2026-06-01. Marker `[M-83.11-supervised-spawn-
cancel-memcpy-segv]` closed. 3 commits на ветке plan-83.11-centralized-
driver pushed to github (`f30998fa940` feat + `421f295c454` fix +
`0bcb61636dd` docs §12.31). Branch merged в main по user request.

segv_diag.c retained как reusable Windows debugging tool — opt-in via
NOVA_DIAG_SEGV=1, zero overhead when unset. Reusable для любых future
Windows runtime races.

Plan 83.11 progress: Ф.0-Ф.3 уже в main (merge cf00a37fb16); §12.31
closed. Open: Ф.4-Ф.9 (blocking migration + cleanup pending design
decision), [M-83.11-gc-cancel-token-alias] (990+ fibers panic,
Option A documented в §11.4).


================================================================================
Plan 83.11 §11.6 — [M-83.11-gc-cancel-token-alias] CLOSED (2026-06-01)
================================================================================

Followup session #13 (одновременно с §12.31). Closed second open marker.

Background: §11 documented GC structural aliasing bug — NovaCancelToken
collected from register at ~512 fibers (ctx_pins[] doubling triggers
nova_alloc → GC sweep), freed tok addr reused by NovaSpawnCtxBase,
structural overlap at offset +8 (bound_scope vs _nova_parent_scope)
causes "token already bound to a live scope" panic при последующем
nova_cancel_token_bind. Threshold: 990+ simultaneously-spawned fibers
under armed M:N on Windows.

Fix per §11.4 Option A — Single self.line() в emit_supervised codegen
(compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs:6195) после declaration
NovaCancelToken* _nova_cancel_tok_{id} = expr, до body emission:

    self.line(&format!(
        "nova_scope_pin_ctx(&{}, (void*){});", queue_var, tv));

Emitted C (verified в stress_iso_large.c:1343):

    NovaCancelToken* _nova_cancel_tok_0 = tok;
    nova_scope_pin_ctx(&_nova_scope_q_0, (void*)_nova_cancel_tok_0);

scope.ctx_pins[] lives on supervised's stack frame, conservative GC
scan always sees it as root → token reachable throughout scope lifetime.
Pattern идентичен Plan 44.5 L5 SpawnCtx pin (same protection mechanism,
different object).

New regression test: nova_tests/concurrency/stress_iso_large.nv
(999+1 spawn + tok.cancel pattern). Stress 30/30 PASS at HEAD vs
0/3 panic pre-fix per §11.3.

§12.31 §pending_driver_jobs counter unaffected — _min.nv (1+1 cancel)
stress still 30/30 PASS. Two fixes orthogonal, no interaction.

Cost: ~10 minutes — 1-line codegen change + 25-line regression test +
§11.6 doc closure. ROI very high — closes documented OPEN marker that
blocked 990+ fiber tests at production scale.

Acceptance:
- A1 — Option A applied per §11.4 ✅
- A2 — stress_iso_large.nv 30/30 PASS ✅
- A3 — no regression to §12.31 fix (_min.nv 30/30 PASS) ✅
- A4 — emitted C inspected ✅

Status: ✅ V1 CLOSED 2026-06-01. Marker [M-83.11-gc-cancel-token-alias]
closed. 1 commit on ветке (9ae6057d574) merged into main same session
(merge 939db7a67d8).

Plan 83.11 progress after session #13:
  Ф.0-Ф.3 already merged (cf00a37fb16)
  §11.6 ✅ CLOSED this session — gc-alias
  §12.31 ✅ CLOSED this session — use-after-free
  Ф.4-Ф.9 — pending design decision


================================================================================
Plan 59.1 — Generic anonymous tuple monomorphization (2026-06-01)
================================================================================

Sub-plan Plan 59 (tuple monomorphization umbrella, ✅ closed 2026-05-17
для Result Ф.7.5; Ф.7.4 named tuple был rejected, reopened в Plan 120;
Ф.7.6 rejected — этот sub-plan ортогонально закрывает residual gap для
general generic anonymous tuples).

Контекст: пользователь поднял вопрос «`fn Channel[T].new(capacity int)
-> (ChanWriter[T], ChanReader[T])` — работает?» в обсуждении Channel
refactor. Probe показал — парсится, но codegen падает CC-FAIL для
произвольных `fn[T] f() -> (T, T)`. Channel.new работает только через
3 ad-hoc special-case branches в emit_c.rs, эмитящих `Nova_ChannelPair`
heap struct вместо реального tuple-мономорфа. Пользователь выбрал
«Вариант Y — широкий» — закрыть generic anonymous tuple mono в codegen
+ удалить Channel-specific paths.

Root cause investigation (Ф.0):
Repro `fn[T] dup(v T) -> (T, T) => (v, v)` + `dup[int](42)` →
CC-FAIL «initializing '_NovaTuple2' with incompatible type». Generated
.c показал что body returns `void*` (heap-boxed `_NovaTuple2*`), call
site assigns к `_NovaTuple2` value type — type mismatch.

Найдены два bailout'а:
1. emit_c.rs:20751-20776 — emit_call dispatch для mono_fn_decls с
   комментарием «Plan 48 V1: skip monomorphization for tuple-returning
   generics. _NovaTupleN structs use nova_int fields (type erasure
   within tuples), so storing a nova_str field directly doesn't work.»
   → Force erasure fallback `register_erased_instance` для всех
   tuple-returning generics.
2. emit_c.rs:26687-26691 — infer_expr_c_type для generic fn Call:
   «Tuple-returning or unresolvable generics use erasure (void* return).»
   → Return "void*" не давая mono path вычислить substituted return type.

Оба bailout'а — relics Plan 48 V1, актуальны до Plan 59 Ф.7.5 (mono'd
schema `_NovaTuple_<arity>_<L1>_<T1>_..._<LN>_<TN>_mono` landed для
Result). Schema валидирована, работает для general tuples, но bailout'ы
никогда не убраны.

Fix (Ф.1):
Оба bailout'а удалены. Mono pipeline теперь покрывает generic tuple
return — type_subst применяется к `TypeRef::Tuple`, элементы
substituted, mono'd tuple typedef registered, body emit'ит value-type
struct, call site assigns корректный type.

Edge cases coverage (Ф.2):
- Multi-instantiation (`dup[int]` + `dup[str]`) — unique typedef'ы.
- Multi-param (`fn[T, U] pair`) — heterogeneous element types.
- Nested generic tuple (`(T, (T, T))`) — recursive substitution.
- Tuple-in-Option (`Option[(T, T)]`) — outer + inner mono.
- Non-generic baseline (`fn make() -> (int, str)`) — без regression.

Edge cases НЕ covered V1:
- `[](T, T)` array-of-mono-tuple — call site infer выдаёт
  `NovaArray_<mono_tuple>*` typedef которого не существует; body
  fallback на `NovaArray_nova_int*`. Mismatch → CC-FAIL. Followup
  [M-59.1-array-of-mono-tuple].

Channel.new cleanup (Ф.3 → deferred):
3 ad-hoc branches в emit_c.rs:18435/20159/22694 эмитят
`Nova_ChannelPair` heap struct (runtime nova_channel_new()). После
Plan 59.1 generic mono path **способен** обработать Channel.new, но
только если добавить Nova-side declaration `external fn[T]
Channel[T].new(...) -> (ChanWriter[T], ChanReader[T])` (Plan 115
Pattern B). Это требует:
- std/runtime/channels.nv с Nova type Channel[T] phantom + external fn
- Runtime nova_channel_new() возможно migrate к direct tuple return
  (или адаптер emit пути)
- Удаление Nova_ChannelPair struct из channels.h
~3-4 dev-day; самостоятельный план/followup. D91 spec amended что
current bootstrap impl — implementation detail.

Negative tests (Ф.4):
- arity_mismatch_neg: EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR — `ro (a, b, c) = dup[int](42)`
  (3 patterns на arity-2 tuple) → Nova-level «tuple destructure arity
  mismatch».
- turbofish_missing_neg: EXPECT_COMPILE_ERROR — `fn[T] empty_pair() ->
  (T, T)` без turbofish → existing Plan 48/54 «cannot infer type
  argument».
- field_oob_neg: EXPECT_CC_ERROR — `pair.5` на arity-2 tuple leaks
  к clang. Followup [M-59.1-tuple-field-oob-nova-diag] для Nova-level
  diagnostic.

Spec (Ф.5):
- D216 NEW (spec/decisions/02-types.md): полное описание generic
  anonymous tuple monomorphization. Sections: mangling schema,
  per-instantiation deduplication, finalize emit (topo sort),
  codegen в emit_call (call site), body emission в
  emit_monomorphized_fn, destructure path, value semantics no heap-box,
  edge cases (V1 covered + V1 limitations followups), backward
  compatibility, cross-refs (D52, D123, D215, D91, D141, Plan 59,
  Plan 59.1).
- D91 amend (spec/decisions/06-concurrency.md): Channel.new signature
  буквально implementable через D216; current bootstrap implementation
  через Nova_ChannelPair — implementation detail, не противоречит
  signature. Cleanup ad-hoc paths → [M-59.1-channel-new-cleanup].
- D123 amend (spec/decisions/02-types.md): Plan 59 Ф.7.5 mono'd schema
  теперь применяется не только к Result, но к любому user generic
  anonymous tuple в return position.
- spec/decisions/README.md: D216 entry + 02-types.md row updated.

Acceptance criteria final (A1-A10):
- A1 ✅ dup probe PASS.
- A2 ✅ multi-instantiation (dup[int] + dup[str]) PASS.
- A3 ✅ multi-param (pair[int, str]) PASS.
- A4 ✅ nested tuple ((T, (T, T))) PASS.
- A5 🟡 array-of-tuple — deferred [M-59.1-array-of-mono-tuple].
- A6 🟡 Channel.new cleanup — deferred [M-59.1-channel-new-cleanup].
- A7 ✅ Regression — plan90 9/0 + plan90_1 20/0 + plan91_7 5/0 +
  syntax 53/1 (pre-existing for_in_range_iter unrelated) +
  concurrency 70/11 (pre-existing armed-M:N flakies — verified
  via main repo binary без Plan 59.1 changes).
- A8 ✅ Spec D216 NEW + D91/D123 amend + README — landed.
- A9 ✅ plan59_1 fixtures 11 (8 positive + 3 negative) ALL PASS.
- A10 ✅ Logs landed.

Closes:
- [M-59.1-codegen-bailout-removed] — emit_c.rs:20751 + 26688
  bailouts удалены.
- [M-59.1-d216-spec] — D216 NEW + D91/D123 amend.
- Plan 59 Ф.7.5 «general generic anonymous tuple» gap — replicates
  Result mono pattern across all user fns.

Unblocks:
- User-side `fn[T] f() -> (A[T], B[T])` factories — patterns теперь
  работают без turbofish-heavy workaround'ов или phantom-record
  wrappers.
- Spec D91 буквальная implementability — основа для future Channel.new
  cleanup ([M-59.1-channel-new-cleanup]).
- Future named tuple amends (Plan 120 D215) могут leverage mono'd
  tuple infrastructure для consistency.

Production-grade requirements (per user instruction):
- ✅ Никаких safety hatches: bailout'ы удалены полностью, ничего не
  unimplemented!/todo!.
- ✅ Mangling schema полностью документирована в D216.
- ✅ Instantiation cache deduplicates — HashSet<Vec<String>> на element
  vectors; same instance в разных compilation paths → single typedef.
- ✅ Mangling deterministic — length-prefix format unambiguous для
  parsing (validated existing Plan 59 Ф.7.5 mono'd Result usage).
- ✅ Performance — нет slower path по сравнению с Plan 59 Ф.7.5
  Result mono (тот же infrastructure).

Worktree nova-p59-1 preserved (per feedback-isolated-worktree) для
followup'ов; branch plan-59.1-generic-anon-tuple-mono pushed на github
(no merge — per user explicit instruction).

Plan 114.4.4 Ф.1 followup — #fn_eval_max_depth(N) spec expansion (2026-06-01)
================================================================================

Branch: plan-114.4.4-fn-eval-depth-spec (off main d4b8f99ccac).

Что: расширена inline subsection D199 V3 для attribute `#fn_eval_max_depth(N)`.

Detail added:
- Syntax form с code example.
- Range constraint: 1..=65535 (parser-enforced; out-of-range = compile error).
- Default value: 256 (constant MAX_EVAL_DEPTH в const_fn_eval.rs).
- Semantics: per-call-site FnDecl.fn_eval_max_depth lookup; check ПЕРЕД
  memoization lookup (guards runaway recursion even с warm memo cache).
- Use cases: deep recursion + conservative limit для API safety.
- Caveat: Rust thread stack ~8MB limits practical N ≤ 150-200. Real
  unbounded deep recursion → [M-114.4.4-iterative-evaluator] V4 followup
  (rewrite evaluator на iterative form с explicit stack).
- Cross-ref: MAX_LOOP_ITERATIONS (Ф.3, default 10_000) + V4
  `#fn_eval_max_iterations(N)` analog.

No code changes — spec polish only. Acceptance A27 уже covered T4.4 Ф.1
positive (depth_override_ok) + negative (depth_default_exceeded_neg).

Commit: 4bd01f5dadd.
Merge: d4b8f99ccac (no-ff).
[Plan 91.12 V1 — D126 partial retract: WriteBuffer/ReadBuffer pure Nova] 2026-06-01

Контекст: D126 (`external type X`) — bridge bootstrap для opaque runtime
types. 5 stdlib типов изначально через D126:
- WriteBuffer, ReadBuffer (std/prelude/collections.nv)
- OnceCell[T], Lazy[T], Condvar (std/runtime/sync.nv)

После Plan 109 (D179) StringBuilder ушёл на pure Nova consume record
над `[]u8`. Тот же паттерн применим к WriteBuffer/ReadBuffer — они
просто обёртки над `[]u8` с cursor/append semantics. Старый C runtime
nova_rt/{write,read}_buffer.h — ~30+60 inline функций с per-width LE/BE
macros — заменены на Nova bodies с bit-shifts + push/extend.

V1 scope (user decision, narrowed mid-session 2026-06-01):
✅ WriteBuffer (std/runtime/write_buffer.nv) — pure Nova, 226 lines.
   Non-consume record + consume @into; 30 методов
   (constructors, query, mutating writes, 18 numeric × LE/BE, into).
✅ ReadBuffer (std/runtime/read_buffer.nv) — pure Nova, 364 lines.
   Cursor record { ro data, mut pos } + 22 try_read_X/read_X pair.
   UTF-8 decode helper (_decode_utf8_at).
🟡 Sync types (OnceCell/Lazy/Condvar) — DEFERRED. Требуют atomic
   state + park/wake primitives, отдельный followup
   [M-91.12-sync-types-migration].

Изменения:
- std/runtime/write_buffer.nv — rewritten as pure Nova
- std/runtime/read_buffer.nv — rewritten as pure Nova
- std/prelude/collections.nv — `external type` → re-import (паттерн StringBuilder)
- compiler-codegen/src/codegen/runtime_registry.rs — write/read_buffer_runtime() → vec![]
- compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs — WriteBuffer/ReadBuffer удалены
  из RUNTIME_DEFINED_TYPES + BUILTIN_RUNTIME_TYPES
- compiler-codegen/nova_rt/nova_rt.h — includes updated
- compiler-codegen/nova_rt/write_buffer.h — DELETED
- compiler-codegen/nova_rt/read_buffer.h — DELETED

Codegen bug fixes incidental к миграции:

1. **Result[T, E].unwrap / .unwrap_or для non-int T (typed mono)**
   Старый C runtime хранил Result Ok payload как nova_int slot
   (boxing для non-int T). При unwrap, codegen делал union bit-pun
   nova_int → target type. Для typed mono `NovaRes_<T>_<E>*` storage
   уже typed (`struct { nova_f64 _0; } Ok`); bit-pun становится wrong
   (interpret nova_f64 value as nova_int, then back as f64 → garbage).
   Fix: detect `NovaRes_*` prefix → direct payload access без cast.
   Affected functions:
   - compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs unwrap_or inline (~line 18020)
   - compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs unwrap inline (~line 18210)

2. **Module-private `const` C-name collision**
   `const X = ...` в разных модулях с одинаковым именем коллидит
   в global symbol table (codegen эмитит `static const TYPE X = ...`
   без module-path mangling). Symptom: `INITIAL_CAPACITY = 16`
   в string_builder.nv и write_buffer.nv → redefinition error.
   Fix: `private_const_c_names: HashMap<(FileId, name), mangled>` —
   pre-pass по module.peer_files. Decl emission mangles. Ident
   resolution: per-file lookup + single-candidate fallback.
   Followup [M-91.12-const-resolution-via-types] для production-grade
   collision disambiguation независимо от span fidelity.

Acceptance:
- A1-A5: ✅ pure Nova implementation; C headers removed; registry empty;
         RUNTIME_DEFINED/BUILTIN_RUNTIME cleaned; collections.nv updated.
- A6: ✅ 11/11 buffers/ fixtures PASS (Windows clang).
- A7: ⏳ full nova test regression — see baseline diff in commit notes.
- A8: ✅ codegen bug fix #1 (typed Result unwrap).
- A9: ✅ codegen bug fix #2 (module const mangling).
- A10: ✅ Plan 91.12 doc + simplifications.md + project-creation.txt.

Fixtures updated:
- nova_tests/buffers/read_floats.nv — test `f64.from_bits + try_read_f64_be
  round-trip` переписан: предыдущий C runtime stored f64 в Result.Ok
  как u64-bits через nova_int slot; тесту приходилось декодировать
  через `f64.from_bits(r.unwrap_or(0))`. Pure-Nova try_read_f64_be
  возвращает декодированный f64 напрямую → тест упрощён до `r.unwrap_or(0.0)`.
- nova_tests/buffers/neg_read_oob.nv — EXPECT_RUNTIME_PANIC обновлён
  на новый формат "unhandled typed Fail" (typed throw'ит variant
  через type#N вместо stringly-typed message).

Followups open:
- [M-91.12-sync-types-migration] — OnceCell/Lazy/Condvar миграция.
- [M-91.12-const-resolution-via-types] — type-checker-aware const lookup.
- [M-91.12-append-filled] — `[]T.append_filled(n, v)` primitive для
  bulk zero-init (replace write_zero push-loop).

Worktree: nova-p91-12 (postoyanniy).
Branch: plan-91.12 (pushed для review, НЕ self-merged).

Closes marker (partial): [M-115-d126-deprecation] PARTIAL RETRACT
  (2 из 5 типов мигрированы; sync types deferred).


[Plan 91.12 V2 — D126 hard retract: Sync types tuple-newtype migration] 2026-06-01

Контекст: V2 продолжение Plan 91.12 V1 (WriteBuffer/ReadBuffer pure Nova).
V1 закрыл 2/5 D126 типов, оставшиеся 3 (Condvar, OnceCell[T], Lazy[T])
требуют C runtime backing для atomic state + park/wake fiber primitives.
V2 мигрирует их на tuple-newtype `type X[T](ptr)` (Plan 115 D214 pattern) —
сохраняет C backing + переходит к стандартному Nova type-system mechanism
вместо D126 `external type` bridge bootstrap.

После V2: все 5 stdlib D126 типов мигрированы (3 различных pattern):
- StringBuilder        → pure Nova consume record (Plan 109 D179)
- WriteBuffer          → pure Nova record { mut buf []u8 } (V1)
- ReadBuffer           → pure Nova cursor { ro data, mut pos } (V1)
- OnceCell[T]          → type OnceCell[T](ptr) tuple-newtype (V2)
- Lazy[T]              → type Lazy[T](ptr) tuple-newtype (V2)
- Condvar              → type Condvar(ptr) tuple-newtype (V2)

D126 plain form formally RETRACTED — type-checker emit'ит hard error
[E_EXTERNAL_TYPE_RETRACTED] для `external type X` (без consume) в ЛЮБОМ
модуле. D163 `external type X consume` (FFI resource handles) сохранён.

Изменения V2:

**std/runtime/sync.nv (3 declarations):**
- `external type OnceCell[T]` → `type OnceCell[T](ptr)`
- `external type Lazy[T]` → `type Lazy[T](ptr)`
- `external type Condvar` → `type Condvar(ptr)`

External fn methods неизменны — ABI идентичен.

**compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs:**
- `emit_type_decl::TypeDeclKind::Newtype` — RUNTIME_BACKED_NEWTYPES list
  (OnceCell/Lazy/Condvar) skip'ает `typedef nova_ptr Nova_X` emission
  (conflict с runtime struct typedef иначе).
- `emit_generic_type_instance::TypeDeclKind::Newtype` — routes per-T
  mono к existing emit_oncecell_instance/emit_lazy_instance (parallel
  Opaque path).
- `emit_module` type_decls registration — `TypeDeclKind::Newtype(_)`
  с генериками регистрируется в `generic_types` + `generic_type_templates`.
  БЕЗ этого type-checker fail'ил resolve `Lazy[int].new(closure)` →
  codegen эмитил `Nova_int_method_new(Lazy, ...)` (misrouted).

**compiler-codegen/src/codegen/external_registry.rs:**
- `from_module type_decls collection` — `TypeDeclKind::Newtype(_) if
  !generics.is_empty() || is_runtime_backed` попадает в `reg.type_decls`.

**compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs:**
- D126 plain external type check: unconditional (no stdlib bypass).
  Hard error E_EXTERNAL_TYPE_RETRACTED с migration hint на `type X(ptr)`
  + ссылку на migration guide docs/migration/d126-to-tuple-newtype.md.
- D163 path сохранён — consume form allowed без error.

**spec/decisions/03-syntax.md:**
- D126 status → 🔴 RETRACTED 2026-06-01 (plain form).
- Migration table 5 stdlib типов.
- E_EXTERNAL_TYPE_RETRACTED diagnostic format documented.

================================================================================
Plan 124 / D47 amend — per-field visibility `priv` modifier (2026-06-02)
================================================================================

Planning + spec amend (implementation в Plan 124.1-124.7 sub-plans,
не начато). Worktree nova-p124, branch plan-124-priv-fields.

Контекст: пользователь предложил `priv` keyword для record/tuple
fields:
  type Account { priv mut money f64, ro name str }

Анализ existing state:
- Spec D47 (07-modules.md) MVP: «Поля record публичны (MVP),
  convention `_prefix` для приватных-по-договору».
- `_prefix` — hint-only privacy (НЕ enforced компилятором).
- Module-level pub/priv через `export` keyword (Plan 35 R26 / D5).
- Field-level visibility — отсутствовала.

Design discussion:
- Initial impulse: private-default (Rust/Swift style). User pushed
  back — «по умолчанию у нас поля публичные» + предложил
  `type X priv { ... }` syntax для per-type opt-in flip.
- Empirical research: kubernetes audit (35239 fields, 11099 structs,
  8700 .go files). 59.4% public / 40.6% private aggregate;
  layer-dependent distribution (pkg/ 47%, staging/ 64%, cmd/ 68%,
  core/v1 92%). Validates D47 public-default — minimum boilerplate
  для API surface (~92% public там).
- Decision: keep public-default (D47); add `priv` field modifier
  (Plan 124.1 / D220); add `type X priv { ... }` type-level flip
  for invariant-heavy types (Plan 124.7).
- Edition flip approach (originally Plan 124.7) REJECTED — kubernetes
  data showed global default flip не оправдан; per-type granular
  лучше fits bimodal distribution.

Decomposition (umbrella + 7 sub-plans, V1-V7 release train):
- V1 124.1 Core record (parser/AST/checker, 4 error codes)
- V2 124.2 Pattern destructure + record literal init rules
- V3 124.3 Generic type uniform handling (Plan 59+59.1 mono compat)
- V4 124.4 Named tuple priv (Plan 120 D215 ext) + protocol impl
- V5 124.5 nova doc + LSP integration
- V6 124.6 Test access + visible_to friend types
- V7 124.7 Type-level priv {} flip syntax (replaces edition flip)

Comparative analysis vs Go/Rust/TS/Kotlin/Java/Swift/C# — 14
capabilities × 7 эталонов matrix; match-or-exceeds на ВСЕХ 14 +
3 Nova-only (no reflection backdoor, tuple field privacy,
consume+priv composition).

Acceptance criteria: 57 шт total (per sub-plan + umbrella):
- 124.1: A1.1-A1.10 (10 шт)
- 124.2: A2.1-A2.8
- 124.3: A3.1-A3.8
- 124.4: A4.1-A4.10
- 124.5: A5.1-A5.8
- 124.6: A6.1-A6.8
- 124.7: A7.1-A7.8
- Umbrella: AU.1-AU.6

D-blocks decomposition:
- D220 NEW (124.1 core priv semantics, 11-section outline)
- D221 NEW (124.2 constructor + pattern rules)
- D222 NEW (124.4 cross-cutting protocols/generics/tuples)
- D5/D175/D176/D215 amend
- D220 amend (124.3 generic clause, 124.6 escape hatches, 124.7
  type-level flip)

Spec amends (committed):
- spec/decisions/07-modules.md D47 — amend notice 2026-06-02;
  «Видимость полей record/tuple» section rewritten; _prefix
  removed from examples (заменён на priv id u64); comparison
  table Nova row updated; «Связь» — Plan 124 / D220 cross-ref.
- spec/decisions/03-syntax.md naming rules — _prefix → priv
  cross-ref.
- spec/decisions/history/rejected.md «Per-field export для record»
  — amended 2026-06-02 с пересмотром позиции.
- spec/open-questions.md JSON skip-семантика — priv fields auto-skip.

Production-grade requirements:
- Formal semantic property (additive feature, backward compat)
- 6 error codes Plan 50 D102 format
- Cross-platform CI matrix
- Bounded budgets (type-check <2%, codegen 0 diff, LSP <5ms,
  doc <10%)
- 4 escape hatches (V6 + V7 type-level flip)
- §14 Execution protocol (self-contained для autonomous agent)

Acceptance criteria (planning task itself):
- ✅ A-plan-1 — kubernetes audit ≥5000 fields sample (achieved
  35239 fields).
- ✅ A-plan-2 — D47 amend landed (07-modules.md + 3-syntax.md +
  rejected.md + open-questions.md).
- ✅ A-plan-3 — Plan doc complete (umbrella + 7 sub-plans + 57
  acceptance criteria + comparative analysis).
- ✅ A-plan-4 — README plans index updated (124 + 7 sub-plan rows).
- ✅ A-plan-5 — 3 логов updated (simplifications + project-
  creation + nova-private/discussion-log).

Closes:
- [M-D47-prefix-convention-deprecated] — _prefix removed.
- [M-Plan-124-scaffold] — umbrella + 7 sub-plans defined.
- [M-Plan-124-kubernetes-audit] — empirical validation.
- [M-Plan-124-V2-revision] — type-level priv flip syntax.

Unblocks:
- Plan 124.1 implementation — foundational gate. Когда реализован —
  unblocks 124.2-124.7 release train.
- Future plans требующие field-level encapsulation (e.g. invariant-
  bearing types в std/runtime — Mutex/Once/Channel state internals).
- Refactoring safety для existing exported types — once priv added,
  internal implementation changes don't break external code.

Tests: N/A (planning task, no implementation). Implementation
tests запланированы в Plan 124.1-124.7 sub-plans (плановое
≥15 fixtures per sub-plan, positive + negative + property).

[Plan 91.12 V2 followup — Generic newtype `type X[T](ptr)` user-FFI support] 2026-06-02

Контекст: Plan 91.12 V2 ранее закрыл миграцию sync types (OnceCell/Lazy/Condvar)
на tuple-newtype через hardcoded per-name routing (RUNTIME_BACKED_NEWTYPES list).
Этот followup extends generic newtype support к произвольным user-level types,
закрывая [M-115-newtype-constructor-generic] и unblocking real user FFI use
cases (phantom-T handles, mutability-tagged buffers, region/arena ownership).

Изменения:

**compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs:**

1. emit_type_decl generic-types branch — добавлен TypeDeclKind::Newtype handler.
   Generic Record/Sum уже emit'ились (lines 8237-8430); Newtype falls through
   на bare `return Ok(())` без emission. Fix: внутри `if !t.generics.is_empty()`
   block добавлен Newtype branch — emit'ает `typedef nova_ptr Nova_X;` (single
   typedef shared across all T monomorphizations) + регистрирует type_aliases
   entry. Skip для RUNTIME_BACKED_NEWTYPES (OnceCell/Lazy/Condvar handled
   через emit_generic_type_instance per-T mono).

2. emit_call constructor intercept (line ~17374) — расширен match для
   TurboFish form:
   - ExprKind::Ident(n) → Some(n) (non-generic case, Plan 115 V1)
   - ExprKind::TurboFish { base: Ident(n), .. } → Some(n) (generic, V2 followup)
   Без этого `MyHandle[int](raw)` пытался резолвиться через free_fn dispatch
   → undefined symbol "MyHandle" в linker stage.

Tests (nova_tests/plan91_12/v3_user_generic_newtype_ok.nv — NEW, 6 blocks):
- single-param `MyHandle[int]` construct + .0
- single-param `MyHandle[str]` construct + .0
- distinct T'ы share same C ABI (nova_ptr equality test)
- multi-param `MultiParam[T, U]` construct + .0
- generic newtype + null ptr literal
- multiple instances — independent values

Spec (spec/decisions/02-types.md D214):
- D214 status header amended: «Plan 91.12 V2 amend (2026-06-02): generic
  tuple-newtype `type X[T](ptr)` now supported».
- NEW §«Generic opaque handle — type X[T](ptr)» с phantom-T semantics +
  multi-param example.

Doc (docs/migration/d126-to-tuple-newtype.md):
- §«Pattern 2 — Tuple newtype над ptr» extended subsection
  «Generic user FFI handle (Plan 91.12 V2 followup, 2026-06-02)» с
  Region[T]/DualHandle[T, U] examples.

Markers:
- ✅ [M-115-newtype-constructor-generic] — CLOSED.
- 🟡 [M-91.12-generic-newtype-non-ptr-inner] — open carry-forward (low
  priority: `type Wrap[T](int)` пер-T mono — non-FFI use case).

Regression:
- plan91_12 7/7 PASS (6 V2 fixtures + 1 V3 new).
- buffers 11/11 PASS.
- plan115 11/11 PASS.
- plan103_5 (OnceCell/Lazy/Once family) 20/20 PASS.

Worktree: nova-p91-12 (продолжается). Branch: plan-91.12.

Plan 114.4.4 finish session — Ф.4 + Ф.5 V4 (2 markers closed) — 2026-06-02
================================================================================

- [M-114.4.3-t-reflection] для primitives → Ф.5 sizeof/align_of.

V4 phase summaries:

Ф.4 record/sum patterns (3ba795e5281):
- ConstValue enum extended: Tuple(Vec<ConstValue>) + Variant(name, args)
  + Record(Vec<(name, value)>) variants.
- match_const_pattern extended: Pattern::Tuple, Pattern::Variant{path, kind},
  Pattern::Record{fields, rest}, Pattern::Binding handled.
- check_const_fn_pattern: V2.0 subset → V4 expanded subset.
- check_const_fn_expr Match: arm_locals collect pattern bindings для
  arm body/guard validation. collect_const_fn_pattern_bindings helper.
- TupleLit/RecordLit accepted в body checker (recursive sub-validation).
- Variant constructor heuristic в check + eval + try_literal_to_value:
  Call(Ident(TitleCase), args) и Name не в const_fn_names → variant.
- try_literal_to_value extended: Unary/Binary/As/TupleLit/Call(variant)
  для arg pre-evaluation на call sites.

Ф.5 t-reflection primitives (69f8d9a1381):
- type_size_or_align(t, is_align) helper: primitive ABI table per
  default 64-bit ABI (int=8, i32=4, i16=2, i8=1, bool=1, char=4,
  str=16, etc.).
- simple_type_name_str helper.
- check_const_fn_expr Call: turbofish callee unwrap; sizeof/align_of
  recognized as builtin без registration.
- check_const_constexpr_ex Call: sizeof/align_of pre-accept перед
  const_fn_names check.
- OwnedEvaluator.eval_expr: sizeof/align_of intrinsic → ConstValue::Int.
- try_literal_to_value: TurboFish sizeof/align_of pre-evaluation.
- walk_expr: sizeof[T]() / align_of[T]() → IntLit replacement для
  module-level const RHS.
- is_known: sizeof/align_of recognized as builtin identifiers
  (name resolution).
- rewrite_const_fn_calls: early-return removed (walk module даже без
  const fn для sizeof intrinsic в const RHS).
- V4.0 surface: primitives only. Records/generics → Plan 114.4.4.2.

- D199 V4 extensions subsection added после V3.
- Q7 updated с V4 closures.

- pattern_variant_ok: unwrap_or через Some(x)/None pattern.
- sizeof_primitives_ok: 5 sizeof/align_of usage examples.
- sizeof_in_const_fn_ok: buf_size(10) = 10*sizeof[int]() = 80.

= 42/42 PASS на release nova-cli.

[Plan 91.12 V2 followup #2 — Generic newtype non-ptr inner + reject inner-uses-param] 2026-06-02

  Если true → error E_GENERIC_NEWTYPE_INNER_USES_PARAM с migration hint:
  «replace with `type X { value T }` (record form)».

[Plan 91.12 V2 followup #3 — TypeRef::uses_any_type_param refactor] 2026-06-02

Контекст: V2 followup #1 (generic newtype) и followup #2 (non-ptr inner)
ввели в types/mod.rs локальный helper `typeref_uses_param`, mirror codegen
helper `type_ref_uses_any_type_param` в emit_c.rs. Эта duplication —
known code-smell, документированная в Session 12 discussion-log как
«acceptable across modules».

Followup #3 — production-grade refactor: extract единственное реализование
в `ast::TypeRef::uses_any_type_param(&self, params: &HashSet<String>) -> bool`,
оба callsite (codegen + type-checker) становятся thin #[inline] wrapper'ами.

**Изменения:**

compiler-codegen/src/ast/mod.rs:
- NEW method `TypeRef::uses_any_type_param` в impl TypeRef block. Covers
  всех 8 variants: Named (path + recurse generics), Array/FixedArray/Readonly
  (recurse inner), Tuple (recurse all elements), Func (recurse params + return),
  Protocol (recurse method params + return), Unit (false).
- NEW `#[cfg(test)] mod typeref_uses_any_type_param_tests` (18 unit tests):
  - 10 positive: named-is-param, generic-arg-is-param, nested-generics,
    array/fixed-array/tuple/func/readonly inner, multi-param match-any.
  - 8 negative: concrete types, multi-segment path (path.len() > 1),
    empty param set, Unit type, concrete generic args, all-concrete func,
    different-named param.

compiler-codegen/src/codegen/emit_c.rs:
- `type_ref_uses_any_type_param` reduced с 25-line full implementation
  до 3-line `#[inline] fn ... { ty.uses_any_type_param(type_params) }`.

compiler-codegen/src/types/mod.rs:
- `typeref_uses_param` reduced с 22-line implementation до 3-line thin
  wrapper to same ast method.

**Test status:**
- `cargo test --release --lib typeref_uses_any_type_param` НЕ работает
  due to pre-existing broken tests в emit_c.rs::mem_ordering_tests
  (Span import path bug, line 28214: `use crate::ast::Span` instead of
  `use crate::diag::Span`). Bug NOT в моём refactor (verified via git stash
  + same error reproduces). Fix этой stale test out of scope для refactor —
  это отдельная code-hygiene задача.

**Integration coverage** (proxy for unit tests):

Plan 114.4.4.5 V4.1 — mono-specialization landed (2026-06-02)
================================================================================

Branch: plan-114.4.4-v4-1 (off main 06b41fb50db).

Closes [M-114.4.3-mono-specialization] — true per-const-arg mono для
mixed const fns (Rust const generics-style).

What landed (1 V4.1 marker):
- Plan 114.4.4.5 mono-specialization V1.

What extracted (focused dev-sessions для each):
- Plan 114.4.4.3 runtime-HOF trampoline — fundamental ABI design
  (const fn → fn pointer conversion has semantic challenge: fully-const
  fn body requires compile-time args; only no-param const fn can have
  runtime trampoline).
- Plan 114.4.4.4 closure-from-const-fn — closure capture semantics
  на compile-time, runtime closure с baked const captures. Requires
  closure runtime integration.

Implementation summary (Plan 114.4.4.5 mono):
- New module compiler-codegen/src/const_fn_mono.rs (~440 lines).
- specialize_mixed_const_fns(module) entry point.
- AST walker collects (mixed_fn, const_args) call sites; generates
  specialization names `<orig>__cst_<idx>`.
- specialize_fn_decl: clones FnDecl, substitutes const param refs в
  body с literal values, drops const params from signature.
- Full AST walker handles все node types (Expr/Stmt/Block/Item).
- Pipeline integration: main.rs (4 sites) + test_runner.rs.
- OwnedEvaluator extended: новое field mixed_fns: HashMap<String, FnDecl>
  alongside mixed_const_params.

Codegen behavior:
- Mixed fn original AST kept (template).
- Spec FnDecls inserted в module.items.
- Call sites rewritten: orig name → spec name + drop const args.
- C output has both original (potentially dead) + all specializations.

V1 fixture removed (V4-superseded):
- body_allocation_neg.nv (V4 Ф.4 allows tuple/record literals).

Tests (plan114_4_4/, 1 new):
- mono_specialization_ok: scale(const factor, x) с 3 call sites —
  factor=3 (twice, reuses spec) + factor=10 (new spec) → 2 distinct
  specializations.

= 42/42 PASS на release nova-cli.

Acceptance: A33 ✅. A34/A35 → Plan 114.4.4.3/4 (V4.2+).

== 2026-06-02 — Plan 114.4.4.3 V4.2: runtime trampoline для first-class const fn
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-114.4.4-v4-2 (off main 800f40a4c2a)
> Status: 🟢 V1 LANDED. Closes [M-114.4.3-runtime-hof].

Замысел:
До V4.2 const fn использованное в non-callee position (Call.arg, Let.value,
Return.value) → friendly error E_CONST_FN_FIRST_CLASS{,_RUNTIME_HOF} с
suggestion обернуть в lambda. Wrap'инг — boilerplate. V4.2 ship'ит
automatic trampoline generation: компилятор генерирует runtime fn
`<orig>__trampoline` с demoted modifiers (const params/return → runtime)
и переписывает first-class uses на trampoline name. Body unchanged
(fully-const fn body состоит из выражений валидных и в runtime).

Реализация:
- Новый модуль compiler-codegen/src/const_fn_trampoline.rs (~660 LOC).
- 4 шага: collect seeds → transitive closure → generate decls → rewrite Idents.
- Pipeline placement: внутри rewrite_const_fn_calls, ПОСЛЕ main walker
  (inline + intrinsics), ДО validate + retain. validate skip'ает names в
  trampoline-set. Retain dropping ориг fully-const fn, trampoline survives.

Тесты (release nova-cli):
- 5 positive fixtures: arg, let_binding, transitive (nested const fn calls),
  alias, recursive (self-call rewrite).
- 1 negative fixture: generic const fn rejected (E_CONST_FN_TRAMPOLINE_GENERIC).
- 2 V3-superseded fixtures removed.
- 17/17 plan114_4_4 PASS + 15/15 plan114_4_2 + 14/14 plan114_4_3 = 46/46.

Spec/Q updates:
- D199 V4.2 extensions subsection (spec/decisions/03-syntax.md).
- A34 acceptance criterion added.
- Q7 V4.2+ closure note (spec/open-questions.md).
- Plan 114.4.4.3 doc status section appended.

Open followups:
- [M-114.4.4-trampoline-generics] — generic const fn first-class use
  (требует full mono pipeline integration для intrinsic substitution
  в generic body).
- [M-114.4.4-trampoline-record-reflection] — record/sum sizeof inside
  trampoline body (V4 limitation, разделено с Plan 114.4.4.2 t-reflection).

Lessons:
- AST walker pattern continues — third walker in const_fn_* family
  (eval, mono, trampoline). Each ~250-440 LOC, mechanical. Pattern
  scales для V4.x extensions.
- Substituting "is_const = false" at trampoline gen time avoids
  invasive codegen changes; trampoline body работает как обычный
  runtime fn body. Cheap demotion strategy.


================================================================================
== 2026-06-02 — Plan 114.4.4.4 V4.3: closure-returning const fn specialization
================================================================================

> Worktree: D:/Sources/nv-lang/nova-p114-4
> Branch: plan-114.4.4-v4-3 (off plan-114.4.4-v4-2 head)
> Status: 🟢 V1 LANDED. Closes [M-114.4.3-closure-from-const-fn].

Замысел:
До V4.3 closure literals в const fn body отвергались
с E_CONST_FN_EFFECT_IN_BODY. V4.3 разрешает специальную форму — const
fn чьё body — single closure literal: `fn make_adder(const n int) ->
const fn(int) -> int => |x| x + n`. При вызове `make_adder(5)`
компилятор генерирует specialized top-level fn `make_adder__closure_0`
с substituted const param (n → 5) в closure body и replaces call site
с Ident'ом к этой specialized fn (Nova поддерживает bare fn name as fn
pointer).

Реализация:
- Новый модуль compiler-codegen/src/const_fn_closure.rs (~700 LOC).
- 4 шага: detect closure-returning fns → walk + rewrite call sites →
  generate specialized FnDecls (clone closure body + substitute) →
  friendly first-class reject.
- Body validator extension в types/mod.rs: closure-at-top-level case
  расширяет scope с closure's own params (validation closure body по
  обычным V1 rules с extended ident set).
- Pipeline placement: ДО main walker в rewrite_const_fn_calls (так что
  eval_call не сталкивается с closure body как ConstValue).

Тесты (release nova-cli):
- 4 positive: basic, dedup (3→2 specs memoization), as_hof (specialized
  closure passed as HOF arg), block_body (closure block с control flow).
- 2 negative: first_class_neg (bare Ident → E_CONST_FN_CLOSURE_FIRST_CLASS),
  arity_neg (closure param count mismatch → E_CONST_FN_CLOSURE_ARITY).
- 23/23 plan114_4_4 PASS + 15/15 plan114_4_2 + 14/14 plan114_4_3 = 52/52.

Spec/Q updates:
- D199 V4.3 extensions subsection (spec/decisions/03-syntax.md).
- A35 acceptance criterion added; 🎯 Plan 114.4.4 family complete table.
- Q7 V4.3+ closure note (spec/open-questions.md) — все Plan 114.4.4
  followups закрыты.
- Plan 114.4.4.4 doc status section appended.

Open followups:
- [M-114.4.4-closure-generic] — generic closure-returning const fn.
- [M-114.4.4-closure-captures-outer] — closure capturing outer locals
  beyond host const params (V1 supports only const param captures).

Lessons:
- Fourth walker в const_fn_* family (eval/mono/trampoline/closure).
  Walker pattern проверенно scalable. Substitution helpers shared с mono.rs
  (copy-paste, refactor в common visitor — followup if >5 walkers).
- "Closure at top-level" — clean detection rule. Recursive closure
  detection (deep inside body) would require full effect propagation —
  V1 keeps narrow scope.
- Pipeline placement difference: closure pass РАНЬШЕ main walker
  (closures can't be ConstValue), trampoline pass ПОЗЖЕ main walker
  (intrinsics already inlined). Discipline критична для correctness.

🎯 Plan 114.4.4 family полностью закрыта (V3-V4.3 phases):
- 114.4.4 V3 (Ф.1-Ф.3) + Ф.4 + Ф.5 V4 (landed earlier sessions)
- 114.4.4.5 V4.1 mono-specialization (2026-06-02)
- 114.4.4.3 V4.2 runtime trampoline (this session AM)
- 114.4.4.4 V4.3 closure-from-const-fn (this session)

All 9 markers from [M-114.4.3-*] closed.
